chapters.zh: 耶和华的仆人摩西死了以后，耶和华晓谕摩西的帮手，嫩的儿子约书亚，说：
chapters.en: Now after the death of Moses the servant of the LORD it came to pass, that the LORD spake unto Joshua the son of Nun, Moses' minister, saying,

chapters.zh: 我的仆人摩西死了。现在你要起来，和众百姓过这约但河，往我所要赐给以色列人的地去。
chapters.en: Moses my servant is dead; now therefore arise, go over this Jordan, thou, and all this people, unto the land which I do give to them, to the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 凡你们脚掌所踏之地，我都照著我所应许摩西的话赐给你们了。
chapters.en: Every place that the sole of your foot shall tread upon, that have I given unto you, as I said unto Moses.

chapters.zh: 从旷野和这利巴嫩，直到伯拉大河，赫人的全地，又到大海日落之处，都要作你们的境界。
chapters.en: From the wilderness and this Lebanon even unto the great river, the river Euphrates, all the land of the Hittites, and unto the great sea toward the going down of the sun, shall be your coast.

chapters.zh: 你平生的日子，必无一人能在你面前站立得住。我怎样与摩西同在，也必照样与你同在；我必不撇下你，也不丢弃你。
chapters.en: There shall not any man be able to stand before thee all the days of thy life: as I was with Moses, I will be with thee: I will not fail thee, nor forsake thee.

chapters.zh: 你当刚强壮胆！因为你必使这百姓承受那地为业，就是我向他们列祖起誓应许赐给他们的地。
chapters.en: Be strong and of a good courage: for unto this people shalt thou divide for an inheritance the land, which I sware unto their fathers to give them.

chapters.zh: 只要刚强，大大壮胆，谨守遵行我仆人摩西所吩咐你的一切律法，不可偏离左右，使你无论往那里去，都可以顺利。
chapters.en: Only be thou strong and very courageous, that thou mayest observe to do according to all the law, which Moses my servant commanded thee: turn not from it the right hand or the left, that thou mayest prosper whithersoever thou goest.

chapters.zh: 这律法书不可离开你的口，总要昼夜思想，好使你谨守遵行这书上所写的一切话。如此，你的道路就可以亨通，凡事顺利。
chapters.en: This book of the law shall not depart out of thy mouth; but thou shalt meditate therein day and night, that thou mayest observe to do according to all that is written therein: for then thou shalt make thy way prosperous, and then thou shalt have good success.

chapters.zh: 我岂没有吩咐你么？你当刚强壮胆！不要惧怕，也不要惊惶；因为你无论往那里去，耶和华 ─ 你的神必与你同在。
chapters.en: Have not I commanded thee? Be strong and of a good courage; be not afraid, neither be thou dismayed: for the LORD thy God with thee whithersoever thou goest.

chapters.zh: 于是，约书亚吩咐百姓的官长说：
chapters.en: Then Joshua commanded the officers of the people, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们要走遍营中，吩咐百姓说：当预备食物；因为三日之内你们要过这约但河，进去得耶和华 ─ 你们神赐你们为业之地。
chapters.en: Pass through the host, and command the people, saying, Prepare you victuals; for within three days ye shall pass over this Jordan, to go in to possess the land, which the LORD your God giveth you to possess it.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对流便人、迦得人，和玛拿西半支派的人说：
chapters.en: And to the Reubenites, and to the Gadites, and to half the tribe of Manasseh, spake Joshua, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们要追念耶和华的仆人摩西所吩咐你们的话说：耶和华 ─ 你们的神使你们得享平安，也必将这地赐给你们。
chapters.en: Remember the word which Moses the servant of the LORD commanded you, saying, The LORD your God hath given you rest, and hath given you this land.

chapters.zh: 你们的妻子、孩子，和牲畜都可以留在约但河东、摩西所给你们的地；但你们中间一切大能的勇士都要带著兵器在你们的弟兄前面过去，帮助他们，
chapters.en: Your wives, your little ones, and your cattle, shall remain in the land which Moses gave you on this side Jordan; but ye shall pass before your brethren armed, all the mighty men of valour, and help them;

chapters.zh: 等到耶和华使你们的弟兄像你们一样得享平安，并且得著耶和华 ─ 你们神所赐他们为业之地，那时才可以回你们所得之地，承受为业，就是耶和华的仆人摩西在约但河东、向日出之地所给你们的。
chapters.en: Until the LORD have given your brethren rest, as you, and they also have possessed the land which the LORD your God giveth them: then ye shall return unto the land of your possession, and enjoy it, which Moses the LORD'S servant gave you on this side Jordan toward the sunrising.

chapters.zh: 他们回答约书亚说：你所吩咐我们行的，我们都必行；你所差遣我们去的，我们都必去。
chapters.en: And they answered Joshua, saying, All that thou commandest us we will do, and whithersoever thou sendest us, we will go.

chapters.zh: 我们从前在一切事上怎样听从摩西，现在也必照样听从你；惟愿耶和华 ─ 你的神与你同在，像与摩西同在一样。
chapters.en: According as we hearkened unto Moses in all things, so will we hearken unto thee: only the LORD thy God be with thee, as he was with Moses.

chapters.zh: 无论甚么人违背你的命令，不听从你所吩咐他的一切话，就必治死他。你只要刚强壮胆！
chapters.en: Whosoever that doth rebel against thy commandment, and will not hearken unto thy words in all that thou commandest him, he shall be put to death: only be strong and of a good courage.

chapters.zh: 当下，嫩的儿子约书亚从什亭暗暗打发两个人作探子，吩咐说：你们去窥探那地和耶利哥。于是二人去了，来到一个妓女名叫喇合的家里，就在那里躺卧。
chapters.en: And Joshua the son of Nun sent out of Shittim two men to spy secretly, saying, Go view the land, even Jericho. And they went, and came into an harlot's house, named Rahab, and lodged there.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉耶利哥王说：今夜有以色列人来到这里窥探此地。
chapters.en: And it was told the king of Jericho, saying, Behold, there came men in hither to night of the children of Israel to search out the country.

chapters.zh: 耶利哥王打发人去见喇合说：那来到你这里、进了你家的人要交出来，因为他们来窥探全地。
chapters.en: And the king of Jericho sent unto Rahab, saying, Bring forth the men that are come to thee, which are entered into thine house: for they be come to search out all the country.

chapters.zh: 女人将二人隐藏，就回答说：那人果然到我这里来；他们是那里来的我却不知道。
chapters.en: And the woman took the two men, and hid them, and said thus, There came men unto me, but I wist not whence they :

chapters.zh: 天黑、要关城门的时候，他们出去了，往那里去我却不知道。你们快快的去追赶，就必追上。
chapters.en: And it came to pass of shutting of the gate, when it was dark, that the men went out: whither the men went I wot not: pursue after them quickly; for ye shall overtake them.

chapters.zh: （先是女人领二人上了房顶，将他们藏在那里所摆的麻中。）
chapters.en: But she had brought them up to the roof of the house, and hid them with the stalks of flax, which she had laid in order upon the roof.

chapters.zh: 那些人就往约但河的渡口追赶他们去了。追赶他们的人一出去，城门就关了。
chapters.en: And the men pursued after them the way to Jordan unto the fords: and as soon as they which pursued after them were gone out, they shut the gate.

chapters.zh: 二人还没有躺卧，女人就上房顶，到他们那里，
chapters.en: And before they were laid down, she came up unto them upon the roof;

chapters.zh: 对他们说：我知道耶和华已经把这地赐给你们，并且因你们的缘故我们都惊慌了。这地的一切居民在你们面前心都消化了；
chapters.en: And she said unto the men, I know that the LORD hath given you the land, and that your terror is fallen upon us, and that all the inhabitants of the land faint because of you.

chapters.zh: 因为我们听见你们出埃及的时候，耶和华怎样在你们前面使红海的水干了，并且你们怎样待约但河东的两个亚摩利王西宏和噩，将他们尽行毁灭。
chapters.en: For we have heard how the LORD dried up the water of the Red sea for you, when ye came out of Egypt; and what ye did unto the two kings of the Amorites, that on the other side Jordan, Sihon and Og, whom ye utterly destroyed.

chapters.zh: 我们一听见这些事，心就消化了。因你们的缘故，并无一人有胆气。耶和华 ─ 你们的神本是上天下地的神。
chapters.en: And as soon as we had heard , our hearts did melt, neither did there remain any more courage in any man, because of you: for the LORD your God, he God in heaven above, and in earth beneath.

chapters.zh: 现在我既是恩待你们，求你们指著耶和华向我起誓，也要恩待我父家，并给我一个实在的证据，
chapters.en: Now therefore, I pray you, swear unto me by the LORD, since I have shewed you kindness, that ye will also shew kindness unto my father's house, and give me a true token:

chapters.zh: 要救活我的父母、弟兄、姊妹，和一切属他们的，拯救我们性命不死。
chapters.en: And ye will save alive my father, and my mother, and my brethren, and my sisters, and all that they have, and deliver our lives from death.

chapters.zh: 二人对他说：你若不泄漏我们这件事，我们情愿替你们死。耶和华将这地赐给我们的时候，我们必以慈爱诚实待你。
chapters.en: And the men answered her, Our life for yours, if ye utter not this our business. And it shall be, when the LORD hath given us the land, that we will deal kindly and truly with thee.

chapters.zh: 于是女人用绳子将二人从窗户里缒下去；因他的房子是在城墙边上，他也住在城墙上。
chapters.en: Then she let them down by a cord through the window: for her house upon the town wall, and she dwelt upon the wall.

chapters.zh: 他对他们说：你们且往山上去，恐怕追赶的人碰见你们；要在那里隐藏三天，等追赶的人回来，然后才可以走你们的路。
chapters.en: And she said unto them, Get you to the mountain, lest the pursuers meet you; and hide yourselves there three days, until the pursuers be returned: and afterward may ye go your way.

chapters.zh: 二人对他说：你要这样行。不然，你叫我们所起的誓就与我们无干了。
chapters.en: And the men said unto her, We blameless of this thine oath which thou hast made us swear.

chapters.zh: 我们来到这地的时候，你要把这条朱红线绳系在缒我们下去的窗户上，并要使你的父母、弟兄，和你父的全家都聚集在你家中。
chapters.en: Behold, we come into the land, thou shalt bind this line of scarlet thread in the window which thou didst let us down by: and thou shalt bring thy father, and thy mother, and thy brethren, and all thy father's household, home unto thee.

chapters.zh: 凡出了你家门往街上去的，他的罪（原文是血）必归到自己的头上，与我们无干了。凡在你家里的，若有人下手害他，流他血的罪就归到我们的头上。
chapters.en: And it shall be, whosoever shall go out of the doors of thy house into the street, his blood upon his head, and we guiltless: and whosoever shall be with thee in the house, his blood on our head, if hand be upon him.

chapters.zh: 你若泄漏我们这件事，你叫我们所起的誓就与我们无干了。
chapters.en: And if thou utter this our business, then we will be quit of thine oath which thou hast made us to swear.

chapters.zh: 女人说：照你们的话行罢！于是打发他们去了，又把朱红线绳系在窗户上。
chapters.en: And she said, According unto your words, so it. And she sent them away, and they departed: and she bound the scarlet line in the window.

chapters.zh: 二人到山上，在那里住了三天，等著追赶的人回去了。追赶的人一路找他们，却找不著。
chapters.en: And they went, and came unto the mountain, and abode there three days, until the pursuers were returned: and the pursuers sought throughout all the way, but found not.

chapters.zh: 二人就下山回来，过了河，到嫩的儿子约书亚那里，向他述说所遭遇的一切事；
chapters.en: So the two men returned, and descended from the mountain, and passed over, and came to Joshua the son of Nun, and told him all that befell them:

chapters.zh: 又对约书亚说：耶和华果然将那全地交在我们手中；那地的一切居民在我们面前心都消化了。
chapters.en: And they said unto Joshua, Truly the LORD hath delivered into our hands all the land; for even all the inhabitants of the country do faint because of us.

chapters.zh: 约书亚清早起来，和以色列众人都离开什亭，来到约但河，就住在那里，等候过河。
chapters.en: And Joshua rose early in the morning; and they removed from Shittim, and came to Jordan, he and all the children of Israel, and lodged there before they passed over.

chapters.zh: 过了三天，官长走遍营中，
chapters.en: And it came to pass after three days, that the officers went through the host;

chapters.zh: 吩咐百姓说：你们看见耶和华 ─ 你们神的约柜，又见祭司利未人抬著，就要离开所住的地方，跟著约柜去。
chapters.en: And they commanded the people, saying, When ye see the ark of the covenant of the LORD your God, and the priests the Levites bearing it, then ye shall remove from your place, and go after it.

chapters.zh: 只是你们和约柜相离要量二千肘，不可与约柜相近，使你们知道所当走的路，因为这条路你们向来没有走过。
chapters.en: Yet there shall be a space between you and it, about two thousand cubits by measure: come not near unto it, that ye may know the way by which ye must go: for ye have not passed way heretofore.

chapters.zh: 约书亚吩咐百姓说：你们要自洁，因为明天耶和华必在你们中间行奇事。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto the people, Sanctify yourselves: for to morrow the LORD will do wonders among you.

chapters.zh: 约书亚又吩咐祭司说：你们抬起约柜，在百姓前头过去。于是他们抬起约柜，在百姓前头走。
chapters.en: And Joshua spake unto the priests, saying, Take up the ark of the covenant, and pass over before the people. And they took up the ark of the covenant, and went before the people.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对约书亚说：从今日起，我必使你在以色列众人眼前尊大，使他们知道我怎样与摩西同在，也必照样与你同在。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, This day will I begin to magnify thee in the sight of all Israel, that they may know that, as I was with Moses, I will be with thee.

chapters.zh: 你要吩咐抬约柜的祭司说：你们到了约但河的水边上，就要在约但河水里站住。
chapters.en: And thou shalt command the priests that bear the ark of the covenant, saying, When ye are come to the brink of the water of Jordan, ye shall stand still in Jordan.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对以色列人说：你们近前来，听耶和华 ─ 你们神的话。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto the children of Israel, Come hither, and hear the words of the LORD your God.

chapters.zh: 约书亚说：看哪，普天下主的约柜必在你们前头过去，到约但河里，因此你们就知道在你们中间有永生神；并且他必在你们面前赶出迦南人、赫人、希未人、比利洗人、革迦撒人、亚摩利人、耶布斯人。
chapters.en: And Joshua said, Hereby ye shall know that the living God among you, and he will without fail drive out from before you the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Hivites, and the Perizzites, and the Girgashites, and the Amorites, and the Jebusites.

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: Behold, the ark of the covenant of the Lord of all the earth passeth over before you into Jordan.

chapters.zh: 你们现在要从以色列支派中拣选十二个人，每支派一人，
chapters.en: Now therefore take you twelve men out of the tribes of Israel, out of every tribe a man.

chapters.zh: 等到抬普天下主耶和华约柜的祭司把脚站在约但河水里，约但河的水，就是从上往下流的水，必然断绝，立起成垒。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, as soon as the soles of the feet of the priests that bear the ark of the LORD, the Lord of all the earth, shall rest in the waters of Jordan, the waters of Jordan shall be cut off the waters that come down from above; and they shall stand upon an heap.

chapters.zh: 百姓离开帐棚要过约但河的时候，抬约柜的祭司乃在百姓的前头。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the people removed from their tents, to pass over Jordan, and the priests bearing the ark of the covenant before the people;

chapters.zh: 他们到了约但河，脚一入水（原来约但河水在收割的日子涨过两岸），
chapters.en: And as they that bare the ark were come unto Jordan, and the feet of the priests that bare the ark were dipped in the brim of the water, (for Jordan overfloweth all his banks all the time of harvest,)

chapters.zh: 那从上往下流的水便在极远之地、撒拉但旁的亚当城那里停住，立起成垒；那往亚拉巴的海，就是盐海，下流的水全然断绝。于是百姓在耶利哥的对面过去了。
chapters.en: That the waters which came down from above stood rose up upon an heap very far from the city Adam, that beside Zaretan: and those that came down toward the sea of the plain, the salt sea, failed, were cut off: and the people passed over right against Jericho.

chapters.zh: 抬耶和华约柜的祭司在约但河中的干地上站定，以色列众人都从干地上过去，直到国民尽都过了约但河。
chapters.en: And the priests that bare the ark of the covenant of the LORD stood firm on dry ground in the midst of Jordan, and all the Israelites passed over on dry ground, until all the people were passed clean over Jordan.

chapters.zh: 国民尽都过了约但河，耶和华就对约书亚说：
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when all the people were clean passed over Jordan, that the LORD spake unto Joshua, saying,

chapters.zh: 你从民中要拣选十二个人，每支派一人，
chapters.en: Take you twelve men out of the people, out of every tribe a man,

chapters.zh: 吩咐他们说：你们从这里，从约但河中、祭司脚站定的地方，取十二块石头带过去，放在你们今夜要住宿的地方。
chapters.en: And command ye them, saying, Take you hence out of the midst of Jordan, out of the place where the priests' feet stood firm, twelve stones, and ye shall carry them over with you, and leave them in the lodging place, where ye shall lodge this night.

chapters.zh: 于是，约书亚将他从以色列人中所预备的那十二个人，每支派一人，都召了来。
chapters.en: Then Joshua called the twelve men, whom he had prepared of the children of Israel, out of every tribe a man:

chapters.zh: 对他们说：你们下约但河中，过到耶和华 ─ 你们神的约柜前头，按著以色列人十二支派的数目，每人取一块石头扛在肩上。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto them, Pass over before the ark of the LORD your God into the midst of Jordan, and take ye up every man of you a stone upon his shoulder, according unto the number of the tribes of the children of Israel:

chapters.zh: 这些石头在你们中间可以作为证据。日后，你们的子孙问你们说：这些石头是甚么意思？
chapters.en: That this may be a sign among you, when your children ask in time to come, saying, What ye by these stones?

chapters.zh: 你们就对他们说：这是因为约但河的水在耶和华的约柜前断绝；约柜过约但河的时候，约但河的水就断绝了。这些石头要作以色列人永远的纪念。
chapters.en: Then ye shall answer them, That the waters of Jordan were cut off before the ark of the covenant of the LORD; when it passed over Jordan, the waters of Jordan were cut off: and these stones shall be for a memorial unto the children of Israel for ever.

chapters.zh: 以色列人就照约书亚所吩咐的，按著以色列人支派的数目，从约但河中取了十二块石头，都遵耶和华所吩咐约书亚的行了。他们把石头带过去，到他们所住宿的地方，就放在那里。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel did so as Joshua commanded, and took up twelve stones out of the midst of Jordan, as the LORD spake unto Joshua, according to the number of the tribes of the children of Israel, and carried them over with them unto the place where they lodged, and laid them down there.

chapters.zh: 约书亚另把十二块石头立在约但河中，在抬约柜的祭司脚站立的地方；直到今日，那石头还在那里。
chapters.en: And Joshua set up twelve stones in the midst of Jordan, in the place where the feet of the priests which bare the ark of the covenant stood: and they are there unto this day.

chapters.zh: 抬约柜的祭司站在约但河中，等到耶和华晓谕约书亚吩咐百姓的事办完了，是照摩西所吩咐约书亚的一切话。于是百姓急速过去了。
chapters.en: For the priests which bare the ark stood in the midst of Jordan, until every thing was finished that the LORD commanded Joshua to speak unto the people, according to all that Moses commanded Joshua: and the people hasted and passed over.

chapters.zh: 众百姓尽都过了河，耶和华的约柜和祭司就在百姓面前过去。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when all the people were clean passed over, that the ark of the LORD passed over, and the priests, in the presence of the people.

chapters.zh: 流便人、迦得人、玛拿西半支派的人都照摩西所吩咐他们的，带著兵器在以色列人前头过去。
chapters.en: And the children of Reuben, and the children of Gad, and half the tribe of Manasseh, passed over armed before the children of Israel, as Moses spake unto them:

chapters.zh: 约有四万人都准备打仗，在耶和华面前过去，到耶利哥的平原，等候上阵。
chapters.en: About forty thousand prepared for war passed over before the LORD unto battle, to the plains of Jericho.

chapters.zh: 当那日，耶和华使约书亚在以色列众人眼前尊大。在他平生的日子，百姓敬畏他，像从前敬畏摩西一样。
chapters.en: On that day the LORD magnified Joshua in the sight of all Israel; and they feared him, as they feared Moses, all the days of his life.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕约书亚说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Joshua, saying,

chapters.zh: 你吩咐抬法柜的祭司从约但河里上来。
chapters.en: Command the priests that bear the ark of the testimony, that they come up out of Jordan.

chapters.zh: 约书亚就吩咐祭司说：你们从约但河里上来。
chapters.en: Joshua therefore commanded the priests, saying, Come ye up out of Jordan.

chapters.zh: 抬耶和华约柜的祭司从约但河里上来，脚掌刚落旱地，约但河的水就流到原处，仍旧涨过两岸。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the priests that bare the ark of the covenant of the LORD were come up out of the midst of Jordan, the soles of the priests' feet were lifted up unto the dry land, that the waters of Jordan returned unto their place, and flowed over all his banks, as before.

chapters.zh: 正月初十日，百姓从约但河里上来，就在吉甲，在耶利哥的东边安营。
chapters.en: And the people came up out of Jordan on the tenth of the first month, and encamped in Gilgal, in the east border of Jericho.

chapters.zh: 他们从约但河中取来的那十二块石头，约书亚就立在吉甲，
chapters.en: And those twelve stones, which they took out of Jordan, did Joshua pitch in Gilgal.

chapters.zh: 对以色列人说：日后你们的子孙问他们的父亲说：这些石头是甚么意思？
chapters.en: And he spake unto the children of Israel, saying, When your children shall ask their fathers in time to come, saying, What these stones?

chapters.zh: 你们就告诉他们说：以色列人曾走干地过这约但河；
chapters.en: Then ye shall let your children know, saying, Israel came over this Jordan on dry land.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华 ─ 你们的神在你们前面使约但河的水干了，等著你们过来，就如耶和华 ─ 你们的神从前在我们前面使红海干了，等著我们过来一样，
chapters.en: For the LORD your God dried up the waters of Jordan from before you, until ye were passed over, as the LORD your God did to the Red sea, which he dried up from before us, until we were gone over:

chapters.zh: 要使地上万民都知道，耶和华的手大有能力，也要使你们永远敬畏耶和华 ─ 你们的神。
chapters.en: That all the people of the earth might know the hand of the LORD, that it mighty: that ye might fear the LORD your God for ever.

chapters.zh: 约但河西亚摩利人的诸王和靠海迦南人的诸王，听见耶和华在以色列人前面使约但河的水干了，等到我们过去，他们的心因以色列人的缘故就消化了，不再有胆气。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when all the kings of the Amorites, which on the side of Jordan westward, and all the kings of the Canaanites, which by the sea, heard that the LORD had dried up the waters of Jordan from before the children of Israel, until we were passed over, that their heart melted, neither was there spirit in them any more, because of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 那时，耶和华吩咐约书亚说：你制造火石刀，第二次给以色列人行割礼。
chapters.en: At that time the LORD said unto Joshua, Make thee sharp knives, and circumcise again the children of Israel the second time.

chapters.zh: 约书亚就制造了火石刀，在除皮山那里给以色列人行割礼。
chapters.en: And Joshua made him sharp knives, and circumcised the children of Israel at the hill of the foreskins.

chapters.zh: 约书亚行割礼的缘故，是因为从埃及出来的众民，就是一切能打仗的男丁，出了埃及以后，都死在旷野的路上。
chapters.en: And this the cause why Joshua did circumcise: All the people that came out of Egypt, males, all the men of war, died in the wilderness by the way, after they came out of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 因为出来的众民都受过割礼；惟独出埃及以后、在旷野的路上所生的众民都没有受过割礼。
chapters.en: Now all the people that came out were circumcised: but all the people born in the wilderness by the way as they came forth out of Egypt, they had not circumcised.

chapters.zh: 以色列人在旷野走了四十年，等到国民，就是出埃及的兵丁，都消灭了，因为他们没有听从耶和华的话。耶和华曾向他们起誓，必不容他们看见耶和华向他们列祖起誓、应许赐给我们的地，就是流奶与蜜之地。
chapters.en: For the children of Israel walked forty years in the wilderness, till all the people men of war, which came out of Egypt, were consumed, because they obeyed not the voice of the LORD: unto whom the LORD sware that he would not shew them the land, which the LORD sware unto their fathers that he would give us, a land that floweth with milk and honey.

chapters.zh: 他们的子孙，就是耶和华所兴起来接续他们的，都没有受过割礼；因为在路上没有给他们行割礼，约书亚这才给他们行了。
chapters.en: And their children, he raised up in their stead, them Joshua circumcised: for they were uncircumcised, because they had not circumcised them by the way.

chapters.zh: 国民都受完了割礼，就住在营中自己的地方，等到痊愈了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when they had done circumcising all the people, that they abode in their places in the camp, till they were whole.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对约书亚说：我今日将埃及的羞辱从你们身上辊去了。因此，那地方名叫吉甲（吉甲就是辊的意思），直到今日。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, This day have I rolled away the reproach of Egypt from off you. Wherefore the name of the place is called Gilgal unto this day.

chapters.zh: 以色列人在吉甲安营。正月十四日晚上，在耶利哥的平原守逾越节。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel encamped in Gilgal, and kept the passover on the fourteenth day of the month at even in the plains of Jericho.

chapters.zh: 逾越节的次日，他们就吃了那地的出产；正当那日吃无酵饼和烘的谷。
chapters.en: And they did eat of the old corn of the land on the morrow after the passover, unleavened cakes, and parched in the selfsame day.

chapters.zh: 他们吃了那地的出产，第二日吗哪就止住了，以色列人也不再有吗哪了。那一年，他们却吃迦南地的出产。
chapters.en: And the manna ceased on the morrow after they had eaten of the old corn of the land; neither had the children of Israel manna any more; but they did eat of the fruit of the land of Canaan that year.

chapters.zh: 约书亚靠近耶利哥的时候，举目观看，不料，有一个人手里有拔出来的刀，对面站立。约书亚到他那里，问他说：你是帮助我们呢，是帮助我们敌人呢？
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Joshua was by Jericho, that he lifted up his eyes and looked, and, behold, there stood a man over against him with his sword drawn in his hand: and Joshua went unto him, and said unto him, thou for us, or for our adversaries?

chapters.zh: 他回答说：不是的，我来是要作耶和华军队的元帅。约书亚就俯伏在地下拜，说：我主有甚么话吩咐仆人。
chapters.en: And he said, Nay; but captain of the host of the LORD am I now come. And Joshua fell on his face to the earth, and did worship, and said unto him, What saith my lord unto his servant?

chapters.zh: 耶和华军队的元帅对约书亚说：把你脚上的鞋脱下来，因为你所站的地方是圣的。约书亚就照著行了。
chapters.en: And the captain of the LORD'S host said unto Joshua, Loose thy shoe from off thy foot; for the place whereon thou standest holy. And Joshua did so.

chapters.zh: 耶利哥的城门因以色列人就关得严紧，无人出入。
chapters.en: Now Jericho was straitly shut up because of the children of Israel: none went out, and none came in.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕约书亚说：看哪，我已经把耶利哥和耶利哥的王，并大能的勇士，都交在你手中。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, See, I have given into thine hand Jericho, and the king thereof, the mighty men of valour.

chapters.zh: 你们的一切兵丁要围绕这城，一日围绕一次，六日都要这样行。
chapters.en: And ye shall compass the city, all men of war, go round about the city once. Thus shalt thou do six days.

chapters.zh: 七个祭司要拿七个羊角走在约柜前。到第七日，你们要绕城七次，祭司也要吹角。
chapters.en: And seven priests shall bear before the ark seven trumpets of rams' horns: and the seventh day ye shall compass the city seven times, and the priests shall blow with the trumpets.

chapters.zh: 他们吹的角声拖长，你们听见角声，众百姓要大声呼喊，城墙就必塌陷，各人都要往前直上。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, that when they make a long with the ram's horn, when ye hear the sound of the trumpet, all the people shall shout with a great shout; and the wall of the city shall fall down flat, and the people shall ascend up every man straight before him.

chapters.zh: 嫩的儿子约书亚召了祭司来，吩咐他们说：你们抬起约柜来，要有七个祭司拿七个羊角走在耶和华的约柜前；
chapters.en: And Joshua the son of Nun called the priests, and said unto them, Take up the ark of the covenant, and let seven priests bear seven trumpets of rams' horns before the ark of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 又对百姓说：你们前去绕城，带兵器的要走在耶和华的约柜前。
chapters.en: And he said unto the people, Pass on, and compass the city, and let him that is armed pass on before the ark of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对百姓说完了话，七个祭司拿七个羊角走在耶和华面前吹角；耶和华的约柜在他们后面跟随。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Joshua had spoken unto the people, that the seven priests bearing the seven trumpets of rams' horns passed on before the LORD, and blew with the trumpets: and the ark of the covenant of the LORD followed them.

chapters.zh: 带兵器的走在吹角的祭司前面，后队随著约柜行。祭司一面走一面吹。
chapters.en: And the armed men went before the priests that blew with the trumpets, and the rereward came after the ark, going on, and blowing with the trumpets.

chapters.zh: 约书亚吩咐百姓说：你们不可呼喊，不可出声，连一句话也不可出你们的口，等到我吩咐你们呼喊的日子，那时才可以呼喊。
chapters.en: And Joshua had commanded the people, saying, Ye shall not shout, nor make any noise with your voice, neither shall word proceed out of your mouth, until the day I bid you shout; then shall ye shout.

chapters.zh: 这样，他使耶和华的约柜绕城，把城绕了一次；众人回到营里，就在营里住宿。
chapters.en: So the ark of the LORD compassed the city, going about once: and they came into the camp, and lodged in the camp.

chapters.zh: 约书亚清早起来，祭司又抬起耶和华的约柜。
chapters.en: And Joshua rose early in the morning, and the priests took up the ark of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 七个祭司拿七个羊角在耶和华的约柜前，时常行走吹角；带兵器的在他们前面走，后队随著耶和华的约柜行。祭司一面走一面吹。
chapters.en: And seven priests bearing seven trumpets of rams' horns before the ark of the LORD went on continually, and blew with the trumpets: and the armed men went before them; but the rereward came after the ark of the LORD, going on, and blowing with the trumpets.

chapters.zh: 第二日，众人把城绕了一次，就回营里去。六日都是这样行。
chapters.en: And the second day they compassed the city once, and returned into the camp: so they did six days.

chapters.zh: 第七日清早，黎明的时候，他们起来，照样绕城七次；惟独这日把城绕了七次。
chapters.en: And it came to pass on the seventh day, that they rose early about the dawning of the day, and compassed the city after the same manner seven times: only on that day they compassed the city seven times.

chapters.zh: 到了第七次，祭司吹角的时候，约书亚吩咐百姓说：呼喊罢，因为耶和华已经把城交给你们了！
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the seventh time, when the priests blew with the trumpets, Joshua said unto the people, Shout; for the LORD hath given you the city.

chapters.zh: 这城和其中所有的都要在耶和华面前毁灭；只有妓女喇合与他家中所有的可以存活，因为他隐藏了我们所打发的使者。
chapters.en: And the city shall be accursed, it, and all that therein, to the LORD: only Rahab the harlot shall live, she and all that with her in the house, because she hid the messengers that we sent.

chapters.zh: 至于你们，务要谨慎，不可取那当灭的物，恐怕你们取了那当灭的物就连累以色列的全营，使全营受咒诅。
chapters.en: And ye, in any wise keep from the accursed thing, lest ye make accursed, when ye take of the accursed thing, and make the camp of Israel a curse, and trouble it.

chapters.zh: 惟有金子、银子，和铜铁的器皿都要归耶和华为圣，必入耶和华的库中。
chapters.en: But all the silver, and gold, and vessels of brass and iron, consecrated unto the LORD: they shall come into the treasury of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 于是百姓呼喊，祭司也吹角。百姓听见角声，便大声呼喊，城墙就塌陷，百姓便上去进城，各人往前直上，将城夺取。
chapters.en: So the people shouted when blew with the trumpets: and it came to pass, when the people heard the sound of the trumpet, and the people shouted with a great shout, that the wall fell down flat, so that the people went up into the city, every man straight before him, and they took the city.

chapters.zh: 又将城中所有的，不拘男女老少，牛羊和驴，都用刀杀尽。
chapters.en: And they utterly destroyed all that in the city, both man and woman, young and old, and ox, and sheep, and ass, with the edge of the sword.

chapters.zh: 约书亚吩咐窥探地的两个人说：你们进那妓女的家，照著你们向他所起的誓，将那女人和他所有的都从那里带出来。
chapters.en: But Joshua had said unto the two men that had spied out the country, Go into the harlot's house, and bring out thence the woman, and all that she hath, as ye sware unto her.

chapters.zh: 当探子的两个少年人就进去，将喇合与他的父母、弟兄，和他所有的，并他一切的亲眷，都带出来，安置在以色列的营外。
chapters.en: And the young men that were spies went in, and brought out Rahab, and her father, and her mother, and her brethren, and all that she had; and they brought out all her kindred, and left them without the camp of Israel.

chapters.zh: 众人就用火将城和其中所有的焚烧了；惟有金子、银子，和铜铁的器皿都放在耶和华殿的库中。
chapters.en: And they burnt the city with fire, and all that therein: only the silver, and the gold, and the vessels of brass and of iron, they put into the treasury of the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 约书亚却把妓女喇合与他父家，并他所有的，都救活了；因为他隐藏了约书亚所打发窥探耶利哥的使者，他就住在以色列中，直到今日。
chapters.en: And Joshua saved Rahab the harlot alive, and her father's household, and all that she had; and she dwelleth in Israel unto this day; because she hid the messengers, which Joshua sent to spy out Jericho.

chapters.zh: 当时，约书亚叫众人起誓说：有兴起重修这耶利哥城的人，当在耶和华面前受咒诅。他立根基的时候，必丧长子，安门的时候，必丧幼子。
chapters.en: And Joshua adjured at that time, saying, Cursed the man before the LORD, that riseth up and buildeth this city Jericho: he shall lay the foundation thereof in his firstborn, and in his youngest shall he set up the gates of it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华与约书亚同在，约书亚的声名传扬遍地。
chapters.en: So the LORD was with Joshua; and his fame was throughout all the country.

chapters.zh: 以色列人在当灭的物上犯了罪；因为犹大支派中，谢拉的曾孙，撒底的孙子，迦米的儿子亚干取了当灭的物；耶和华的怒气就向以色列人发作。
chapters.en: But the children of Israel committed a trespass in the accursed thing: for Achan, the son of Carmi, the son of Zabdi, the son of Zerah, of the tribe of Judah, took of the accursed thing: and the anger of the LORD was kindled against the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 当下，约书亚从耶利哥打发人往伯特利东边、靠近伯亚文的艾城去，吩咐他们说：你们上去窥探那地。他们就上去窥探艾城。
chapters.en: And Joshua sent men from Jericho to Ai, which beside Bethaven, on the east side of Bethel, and spake unto them, saying, Go up and view the country. And the men went up and viewed Ai.

chapters.zh: 他们回到约书亚那里，对他说：众民不必都上去，只要二三千人上去就能攻取艾城；不必劳累众民都去，因为那里的人少。
chapters.en: And they returned to Joshua, and said unto him, Let not all the people go up; but let about two or three thousand men go up and smite Ai; make not all the people to labour thither; for they few.

chapters.zh: 于是民中约有三千人上那里去，竟在艾城人面前逃跑了。
chapters.en: So there went up thither of the people about three thousand men: and they fled before the men of Ai.

chapters.zh: 艾城的人击杀了他们三十六人，从城门前追赶他们，直到示巴琳，在下坡杀败他们；众民的心就消化如水。
chapters.en: And the men of Ai smote of them about thirty and six men: for they chased them before the gate unto Shebarim, and smote them in the going down: wherefore the hearts of the people melted, and became as water.

chapters.zh: 约书亚便撕裂衣服；他和以色列的长老把灰撒在头上，在耶和华的约柜前俯伏在地，直到晚上。
chapters.en: And Joshua rent his clothes, and fell to the earth upon his face before the ark of the LORD until the eventide, he and the elders of Israel, and put dust upon their heads.

chapters.zh: 约书亚说：哀哉！主耶和华阿，你为甚么竟领这百姓过约但河，将我们交在亚摩利人的手中，使我们灭亡呢？我们不如住在约但河那边倒好。
chapters.en: And Joshua said, Alas, O Lord GOD, wherefore hast thou at all brought this people over Jordan, to deliver us into the hand of the Amorites, to destroy us? would to God we had been content, and dwelt on the other side Jordan!

chapters.zh: 主阿，以色列人既在仇敌面前转背逃跑，我还有甚么可说的呢？
chapters.en: O Lord, what shall I say, when Israel turneth their backs before their enemies!

chapters.zh: 迦南人和这地一切的居民听见了就必围困我们，将我们的名从地上除灭。那时你为你的大名要怎样行呢？
chapters.en: For the Canaanites and all the inhabitants of the land shall hear , and shall environ us round, and cut off our name from the earth: and what wilt thou do unto thy great name?

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐约书亚说：起来！你为何这样俯伏在地呢？
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Get thee up; wherefore liest thou thus upon thy face?

chapters.zh: 以色列人犯了罪，违背了我所吩咐他们的约，取了当灭的物；又偷窃，又行诡诈，又把那当灭的放在他们的家具里。
chapters.en: Israel hath sinned, and they have also transgressed my covenant which I commanded them: for they have even taken of the accursed thing, and have also stolen, and dissembled also, and they have put even among their own stuff.

chapters.zh: 因此，以色列人在仇敌面前站立不住。他们在仇敌面前转背逃跑，是因成了被咒诅的；你们若不把当灭的物从你们中间除掉，我就不再与你们同在了。
chapters.en: Therefore the children of Israel could not stand before their enemies, turned backs before their enemies, because they were accursed: neither will I be with you any more, except ye destroy the accursed from among you.

chapters.zh: 你起来，叫百姓自洁，对他们说：你们要自洁，预备明天，因为耶和华 ─ 以色列的神这样说：以色列阿，你们中间有当灭的物，你们若不除掉，在仇敌面前必站立不住！
chapters.en: Up, sanctify the people, and say, Sanctify yourselves against to morrow: for thus saith the LORD God of Israel, an accursed thing in the midst of thee, O Israel: thou canst not stand before thine enemies, until ye take away the accursed thing from among you.

chapters.zh: 到了早晨，你们要按著支派近前来；耶和华所取的支派，要按著宗族近前来；耶和华所取的宗族，要按著家室近前来；耶和华所取的家室，要按著人丁，一个一个的近前来。
chapters.en: In the morning therefore ye shall be brought according to your tribes: and it shall be, the tribe which the LORD taketh shall come according to the families ; and the family which the LORD shall take shall come by households; and the household which the LORD shall take shall come man by man.

chapters.zh: 被取的人有当灭的物在他那里，他和他所有的必被火焚烧；因他违背了耶和华的约，又因他在以色列中行了愚妄的事。
chapters.en: And it shall be, he that is taken with the accursed thing shall be burnt with fire, he and all that he hath: because he hath transgressed the covenant of the LORD, and because he hath wrought folly in Israel.

chapters.zh: 于是，约书亚清早起来，使以色列人按著支派近前来，取出来的是犹大支派；
chapters.en: So Joshua rose up early in the morning, and brought Israel by their tribes; and the tribe of Judah was taken:

chapters.zh: 使犹大支派（原文是宗族）近前来，就取了谢拉的宗族；使谢拉的宗族，按著家室人丁，一个一个的近前来，取出来的是撒底；
chapters.en: And he brought the family of Judah; and he took the family of the Zarhites: and he brought the family of the Zarhites man by man; and Zabdi was taken:

chapters.zh: 使撒底的家室，按著人丁，一个一个的近前来，就取出犹大支派的人谢拉的曾孙，撒底的孙子，迦米的儿子亚干。
chapters.en: And he brought his household man by man; and Achan, the son of Carmi, the son of Zabdi, the son of Zerah, of the tribe of Judah, was taken.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对亚干说：我儿，我劝你将荣耀归给耶和华 ─ 以色列的神，在他面前认罪，将你所做的事告诉我，不要向我隐瞒。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto Achan, My son, give, I pray thee, glory to the LORD God of Israel, and make confession unto him; and tell me now what thou hast done; hide not from me.

chapters.zh: 亚干回答约书亚说：我实在得罪了耶和华 ─ 以色列的神。我所做的事如此如此：
chapters.en: And Achan answered Joshua, and said, Indeed I have sinned against the LORD God of Israel, and thus and thus have I done:

chapters.zh: 我在所夺的财物中看见一件美好的示拿衣服，二百舍客勒银子，一条金子重五十舍客勒，我就贪爱这些物件，便拿去了。现今藏在我帐棚内的地里，银子在衣服底下。
chapters.en: When I saw among the spoils a goodly Babylonish garment, and two hundred shekels of silver, and a wedge of gold of fifty shekels weight, then I coveted them, and took them; and, behold, they hid in the earth in the midst of my tent, and the silver under it.

chapters.zh: 约书亚就打发人跑到亚干的帐棚里。那件衣服果然藏在他帐棚内，银子在底下。
chapters.en: So Joshua sent messengers, and they ran unto the tent; and, behold, hid in his tent, and the silver under it.

chapters.zh: 他们就从帐棚里取出来，拿到约书亚和以色列众人那里，放在耶和华面前。
chapters.en: And they took them out of the midst of the tent, and brought them unto Joshua, and unto all the children of Israel, and laid them out before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人把谢拉的曾孙亚干和那银子、那件衣服、那条金子，并亚干的儿女、牛、驴、羊、帐棚，以及他所有的，都带到亚割谷去。
chapters.en: And Joshua, and all Israel with him, took Achan the son of Zerah, and the silver, and the garment, and the wedge of gold, and his sons, and his daughters, and his oxen, and his asses, and his sheep, and his tent, and all that he had: and they brought them unto the valley of Achor.

chapters.zh: 约书亚说：你为甚么连累我们呢？今日耶和华必叫你受连累。于是以色列众人用石头打死他，将石头扔在其上，又用火焚烧他所有的（他所有的原文作他们）。
chapters.en: And Joshua said, Why hast thou troubled us? the LORD shall trouble thee this day. And all Israel stoned him with stones, and burned them with fire, after they had stoned them with stones.

chapters.zh: 众人在亚干身上堆成一大堆石头，直存到今日。于是耶和华转意，不发他的烈怒。因此那地方名叫亚割谷（亚割就是连累的意思），直到今日。
chapters.en: And they raised over him a great heap of stones unto this day. So the LORD turned from the fierceness of his anger. Wherefore the name of that place was called, The valley of Achor, unto this day.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对约书亚说：不要惧怕，也不要惊惶。你起来，率领一切兵丁上艾城去，我已经把艾城的王和他的民、他的城，并他的地，都交在你手里。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Fear not, neither be thou dismayed: take all the people of war with thee, and arise, go up to Ai: see, I have given into thy hand the king of Ai, and his people, and his city, and his land:

chapters.zh: 你怎样待耶利哥和耶利哥的王，也当照样待艾城和艾城的王。只是城内所夺的财物和牲畜，你们可以取为自己的掠物。你要在城后设下伏兵。
chapters.en: And thou shalt do to Ai and her king as thou didst unto Jericho and her king: only the spoil thereof, and the cattle thereof, shall ye take for a prey unto yourselves: lay thee an ambush for the city behind it.

chapters.zh: 于是，约书亚和一切兵丁都起来，要上艾城去。约书亚选了三万大能的勇士，夜间打发他们前往，
chapters.en: So Joshua arose, and all the people of war, to go up against Ai: and Joshua chose out thirty thousand mighty men of valour, and sent them away by night.

chapters.zh: 吩咐他们说：你们要在城后埋伏，不可离城太远，都要各自准备。
chapters.en: And he commanded them, saying, Behold, ye shall lie in wait against the city, behind the city: go not very far from the city, but be ye all ready:

chapters.zh: 我与我所带领的众民要向城前往。城里的人像初次出来攻击我们的时候，我们就在他们面前逃跑，
chapters.en: And I, and all the people that with me, will approach unto the city: and it shall come to pass, when they come out against us, as at the first, that we will flee before them,

chapters.zh: 他们必出来追赶我们，直到我们引诱他们离开城；因为他们必说：这些人像初次在我们面前逃跑。所以我们要在他们面前逃跑，
chapters.en: (For they will come out after us) till we have drawn them from the city; for they will say, They flee before us, as at the first: therefore we will flee before them.

chapters.zh: 你们就从埋伏的地方起来，夺取那城，因为耶和华 ─ 你们的神必把城交在你们手里。
chapters.en: Then ye shall rise up from the ambush, and seize upon the city: for the LORD your God will deliver it into your hand.

chapters.zh: 你们夺了城以后，就放火烧城，要照耶和华的话行。这是我吩咐你们的。
chapters.en: And it shall be, when ye have taken the city, ye shall set the city on fire: according to the commandment of the LORD shall ye do. See, I have commanded you.

chapters.zh: 约书亚打发他们前往，他们就上埋伏的地方去，住在伯特利和艾城的中间，就是在艾城的西边。这夜约书亚却在民中住宿。
chapters.en: Joshua therefore sent them forth: and they went to lie in ambush, and abode between Bethel and Ai, on the west side of Ai: but Joshua lodged that night among the people.

chapters.zh: 约书亚清早起来，点齐百姓，他和以色列的长老在百姓前面上艾城去。
chapters.en: And Joshua rose up early in the morning, and numbered the people, and went up, he and the elders of Israel, before the people to Ai.

chapters.zh: 众民，就是他所带领的兵丁，都上去，向前直往，来到城前，在艾城北边安营。在约书亚和艾城中间有一山谷。
chapters.en: And all the people, of war that with him, went up, and drew nigh, and came before the city, and pitched on the north side of Ai: now a valley between them and Ai.

chapters.zh: 他挑了约有五千人，使他们埋伏在伯特利和艾城的中间，就是在艾城的西边，
chapters.en: And he took about five thousand men, and set them to lie in ambush between Bethel and Ai, on the west side of the city.

chapters.zh: 于是安置了百姓，就是城北的全军和城西的伏兵。这夜约书亚进入山谷之中。
chapters.en: And when they had set the people, all the host that on the north of the city, and their liers in wait on the west of the city, Joshua went that night into the midst of the valley.

chapters.zh: 艾城的王看见这景况，就和全城的人，清早急忙起来，按所定的时候，出到亚拉巴前，要与以色列人交战；王却不知道在城后有伏兵。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the king of Ai saw , that they hasted and rose up early, and the men of the city went out against Israel to battle, he and all his people, at a time appointed, before the plain; but he wist not that liers in ambush against him behind the city.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人在他们面前装败，往那通旷野的路逃跑。
chapters.en: And Joshua and all Israel made as if they were beaten before them, and fled by the way of the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 城内的众民都被招聚，追赶他们；艾城人追赶的时候，就被引诱离开城。
chapters.en: And all the people that in Ai were called together to pursue after them: and they pursued after Joshua, and were drawn away from the city.

chapters.zh: 艾城和伯特利城没有一人不出来追赶以色列人的，撇了敞开的城门，去追赶以色列人。
chapters.en: And there was not a man left in Ai or Bethel, that went not out after Israel: and they left the city open, and pursued after Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐约书亚说：你向艾城伸出手里的短鎗，因为我要将城交在你手里。约书亚就向城伸出手里的短鎗。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Stretch out the spear that in thy hand toward Ai; for I will give it into thine hand. And Joshua stretched out the spear that in his hand toward the city.

chapters.zh: 他一伸手，伏兵就从埋伏的地方急忙起来，夺了城，跑进城去，放火焚烧。
chapters.en: And the ambush arose quickly out of their place, and they ran as soon as he had stretched out his hand: and they entered into the city, and took it, and hasted and set the city on fire.

chapters.zh: 艾城的人回头一看，不料，城中烟气冲天，他们就无力向左向右逃跑。那往旷野逃跑的百姓便转身攻击追赶他们的人。
chapters.en: And when the men of Ai looked behind them, they saw, and, behold, the smoke of the city ascended up to heaven, and they had no power to flee this way or that way: and the people that fled to the wilderness turned back upon the pursuers.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人见伏兵已经夺了城，城中烟气飞腾，就转身回去，击杀艾城的人。
chapters.en: And when Joshua and all Israel saw that the ambush had taken the city, and that the smoke of the city ascended, then they turned again, and slew the men of Ai.

chapters.zh: 伏兵也出城迎击艾城人，艾城人就困在以色列人中间，前后都是以色列人。于是以色列人击杀他们，没有留下一个，也没有一个逃脱的，
chapters.en: And the other issued out of the city against them; so they were in the midst of Israel, some on this side, and some on that side: and they smote them, so that they let none of them remain or escape.

chapters.zh: 生擒了艾城的王，将他解到约书亚那里。
chapters.en: And the king of Ai they took alive, and brought him to Joshua.

chapters.zh: 以色列人在田间和旷野杀尽所追赶一切艾城的居民。艾城人倒在刀下，直到灭尽；以色列众人就回到艾城，用刀杀了城中的人。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Israel had made an end of slaying all the inhabitants of Ai in the field, in the wilderness wherein they chased them, and when they were all fallen on the edge of the sword, until they were consumed, that all the Israelites returned unto Ai, and smote it with the edge of the sword.

chapters.zh: 当日杀毙的人，连男带女共有一万二千，就是艾城所有的人。
chapters.en: And it was, all that fell that day, both of men and women, twelve thousand, all the men of Ai.

chapters.zh: 约书亚没有收回手里所伸出来的短鎗，直到把艾城的一切居民尽行杀灭。
chapters.en: For Joshua drew not his hand back, wherewith he stretched out the spear, until he had utterly destroyed all the inhabitants of Ai.

chapters.zh: 惟独城中的牲畜和财物，以色列人都取为自己的掠物，是照耶和华所吩咐约书亚的话。
chapters.en: Only the cattle and the spoil of that city Israel took for a prey unto themselves, according unto the word of the LORD which he commanded Joshua.

chapters.zh: 约书亚将艾城焚烧，使城永为高堆、荒场，直到今日；
chapters.en: And Joshua burnt Ai, and made it an heap for ever, a desolation unto this day.

chapters.zh: 又将艾城王挂在树上，直到晚上。日落的时候，约书亚吩咐人把尸首从树上取下来，丢在城门口，在尸首上堆成一大堆石头，直存到今日。
chapters.en: And the king of Ai he hanged on a tree until eventide: and as soon as the sun was down, Joshua commanded that they should take his carcase down from the tree, and cast it at the entering of the gate of the city, and raise thereon a great heap of stones, unto this day.

chapters.zh: 那时，约书亚在以巴路山上为耶和华 ─ 以色列的神筑一座坛，
chapters.en: Then Joshua built an altar unto the LORD God of Israel in mount Ebal,

chapters.zh: 是用没有动过铁器的整石头筑的，照著耶和华仆人摩西所吩咐以色列人的话，正如摩西律法书上所写的。众人在这坛上给耶和华奉献燔祭和平安祭。
chapters.en: As Moses the servant of the LORD commanded the children of Israel, as it is written in the book of the law of Moses, an altar of whole stones, over which no man hath lift up iron: and they offered thereon burnt offerings unto the LORD, and sacrificed peace offerings.

chapters.zh: 约书亚在那里，当著以色列人面前，将摩西所写的律法抄写在石头上。
chapters.en: And he wrote there upon the stones a copy of the law of Moses, which he wrote in the presence of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 以色列众人，无论是本地人、是寄居的，和长老、官长，并审判官，都站在约柜两旁，在抬耶和华约柜的祭司利未人面前，一半对著基利心山，一半对著以巴路山，为以色列民祝福，正如耶和华仆人摩西先前所吩咐的。
chapters.en: And all Israel, and their elders, and officers, and their judges, stood on this side the ark and on that side before the priests the Levites, which bare the ark of the covenant of the LORD, as well the stranger, as he that was born among them; half of them over against mount Gerizim, and half of them over against mount Ebal; as Moses the servant of the LORD had commanded before, that they should bless the people of Israel.

chapters.zh: 随后，约书亚将律法上祝福、咒诅的话，照著律法书上一切所写的，都宣读了一遍。
chapters.en: And afterward he read all the words of the law, the blessings and cursings, according to all that is written in the book of the law.

chapters.zh: 摩西所吩咐的一切话，约书亚在以色列全会众和妇女、孩子，并他们中间寄居的外人面前，没有一句不宣读的。
chapters.en: There was not a word of all that Moses commanded, which Joshua read not before all the congregation of Israel, with the women, and the little ones, and the strangers that were conversant among them.

chapters.zh: 约但河西，住山地、高原，并对著利巴嫩山沿大海一带的诸王，就是赫人、亚摩利人、迦南人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人的诸王，听见这事，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when all the kings which on this side Jordan, in the hills, and in the valleys, and in all the coasts of the great sea over against Lebanon, the Hittite, and the Amorite, the Canaanite, the Perizzite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite, heard ;

chapters.zh: 就都聚集，同心合意的要与约书亚和以色列人争战。
chapters.en: That they gathered themselves together, to fight with Joshua and with Israel, with one accord.

chapters.zh: 基遍的居民听见约书亚向耶利哥和艾城所行的事，
chapters.en: And when the inhabitants of Gibeon heard what Joshua had done unto Jericho and to Ai,

chapters.zh: 就设诡计，假充使者，拿旧口袋和破裂缝补的旧皮酒袋驮在驴上，
chapters.en: They did work wilily, and went and made as if they had been ambassadors, and took old sacks upon their asses, and wine bottles, old, and rent, and bound up;

chapters.zh: 将补过的旧鞋穿在脚上，把旧衣服穿在身上；他们所带的饼都是干的，长了霉了。
chapters.en: And old shoes and clouted upon their feet, and old garments upon them; and all the bread of their provision was dry mouldy.

chapters.zh: 他们到吉甲营中见约书亚，对他和以色列人说：我们是从远方来的，现在求你与我们立约。
chapters.en: And they went to Joshua unto the camp at Gilgal, and said unto him, and to the men of Israel, We be come from a far country: now therefore make ye a league with us.

chapters.zh: 以色列人对这些希未人说：只怕你们是住在我们中间的；若是这样，怎能和你们立约呢？
chapters.en: And the men of Israel said unto the Hivites, Peradventure ye dwell among us; and how shall we make a league with you?

chapters.zh: 他们对约书亚说：我们是你的仆人。约书亚问他们说：你们是甚么人？是从那里来的？
chapters.en: And they said unto Joshua, We thy servants. And Joshua said unto them, Who ye? and from whence come ye?

chapters.zh: 他们回答说：仆人从极远之地而来，是因听见耶和华 ─ 你神的名声和他在埃及所行的一切事，
chapters.en: And they said unto him, From a very far country thy servants are come because of the name of the LORD thy God: for we have heard the fame of him, and all that he did in Egypt,

chapters.zh: 并他向约但河东的两个亚摩利王，就是希实本王西宏和在亚斯他录的巴珊王噩一切所行的事。
chapters.en: And all that he did to the two kings of the Amorites, that beyond Jordan, to Sihon king of Heshbon, and to Og king of Bashan, which at Ashtaroth.

chapters.zh: 我们的长老和我们那地的一切居民对我们说：你们手里要带著路上用的食物去迎接以色列人，对他们说：我们是你们的仆人；现在求你们与我们立约。
chapters.en: Wherefore our elders and all the inhabitants of our country spake to us, saying, Take victuals with you for the journey, and go to meet them, and say unto them, We your servants: therefore now make ye a league with us.

chapters.zh: 我们出来要往你们这里来的日子，从家里带出来的这饼还是热的；看哪，现在都干了，长了霉了。
chapters.en: This our bread we took hot our provision out of our houses on the day we came forth to go unto you; but now, behold, it is dry, and it is mouldy:

chapters.zh: 这皮酒袋，我们盛酒的时候还是新的；看哪，现在已经破裂。我们这衣服和鞋，因为道路甚远，也都穿旧了。
chapters.en: And these bottles of wine, which we filled, new; and, behold, they be rent: and these our garments and our shoes are become old by reason of the very long journey.

chapters.zh: 以色列人受了他们些食物，并没有求问耶和华。
chapters.en: And the men took of their victuals, and asked not at the mouth of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚与他们讲和，与他们立约，容他们活著；会众的首领也向他们起誓。
chapters.en: And Joshua made peace with them, and made a league with them, to let them live: and the princes of the congregation sware unto them.

chapters.zh: 以色列人与他们立约之后，过了三天才听见他们是近邻，住在以色列人中间的。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the end of three days after they had made a league with them, that they heard that they their neighbours, and they dwelt among them.

chapters.zh: 以色列人起行，第三天到了他们的城邑，就是基遍、基非拉、比录、基列耶琳。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel journeyed, and came unto their cities on the third day. Now their cities Gibeon, and Chephirah, and Beeroth, and Kirjathjearim.

chapters.zh: 因为会众的首领已经指著耶和华 ─ 以色列的神向他们起誓，所以以色列人不击杀他们；全会众就向首领发怨言。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel smote them not, because the princes of the congregation had sworn unto them by the LORD God of Israel. And all the congregation murmured against the princes.

chapters.zh: 众首领对全会众说：我们已经指著耶和华 ─ 以色列的神向他们起誓，现在我们不能害他们。
chapters.en: But all the princes said unto all the congregation, We have sworn unto them by the LORD God of Israel: now therefore we may not touch them.

chapters.zh: 我们要如此待他们，容他们活著，免得有忿怒因我们所起的誓临到我们身上。
chapters.en: This we will do to them; we will even let them live, lest wrath be upon us, because of the oath which we sware unto them.

chapters.zh: 首领又对会众说：要容他们活著。于是他们为全会众作了劈柴挑水的人，正如首领对他们所说的话。
chapters.en: And the princes said unto them, Let them live; but let them be hewers of wood and drawers of water unto all the congregation; as the princes had promised them.

chapters.zh: 约书亚召了他们来，对他们说：为甚么欺哄我们说我们离你们甚远呢？其实你们是住在我们中间。
chapters.en: And Joshua called for them, and he spake unto them, saying, Wherefore have ye beguiled us, saying, We very far from you; when ye dwell among us?

chapters.zh: 现在你们是被咒诅的！你们中间的人必断不了作奴仆，为我神的殿作劈柴挑水的人。
chapters.en: Now therefore ye cursed, and there shall none of you be freed from being bondmen, and hewers of wood and drawers of water for the house of my God.

chapters.zh: 他们回答约书亚说：因为有人实在告诉你的仆人，耶和华 ─ 你的神曾吩咐他的仆人摩西，把这全地赐给你们，并在你们面前灭绝这地的一切居民，所以我们为你们的缘故甚怕丧命，就行了这事。
chapters.en: And they answered Joshua, and said, Because it was certainly told thy servants, how that the LORD thy God commanded his servant Moses to give you all the land, and to destroy all the inhabitants of the land from before you, therefore we were sore afraid of our lives because of you, and have done this thing.

chapters.zh: 现在我们在你手中，你以怎样待我们为善为正，就怎样做罢！
chapters.en: And now, behold, we in thine hand: as it seemeth good and right unto thee to do unto us, do.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚这样待他们，救他们脱离以色列人的手，以色列人就没有杀他们。
chapters.en: And so did he unto them, and delivered them out of the hand of the children of Israel, that they slew them not.

chapters.zh: 当日约书亚使他们在耶和华所要选择的地方，为会众和耶和华的坛作劈柴挑水的人，直到今日。
chapters.en: And Joshua made them that day hewers of wood and drawers of water for the congregation, and for the altar of the LORD, even unto this day, in the place which he should choose.

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷王亚多尼洗德听见约书亚夺了艾城，尽行毁灭，怎样待耶利哥和耶利哥的王，也照样待艾城和艾城的王，又听见基遍的居民与以色列人立了和约，住在他们中间，
chapters.en: Now it came to pass, when Adonizedek king of Jerusalem had heard how Joshua had taken Ai, and had utterly destroyed it; as he had done to Jericho and her king, so he had done to Ai and her king; and how the inhabitants of Gibeon had made peace with Israel, and were among them;

chapters.zh: 就甚惧怕；因为基遍是一座大城，如都城一般，比艾城更大，并且城内的人都是勇士。
chapters.en: That they feared greatly, because Gibeon a great city, as one of the royal cities, and because it greater than Ai, and all the men thereof mighty.

chapters.zh: 所以耶路撒冷王亚多尼洗德打发人去见希伯仑王何咸、耶末王毘兰、拉吉王雅非亚，和伊矶伦王底璧，说：
chapters.en: Wherefore Adonizedek king of Jerusalem sent unto Hoham king of Hebron, and unto Piram king of Jarmuth, and unto Japhia king of Lachish, and unto Debir king of Eglon, saying,

chapters.zh: 求你们上来帮助我，我们好攻打基遍，因为他们与约书亚和以色列人立了和约。
chapters.en: Come up unto me, and help me, that we may smite Gibeon: for it hath made peace with Joshua and with the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 于是五个亚摩利王，就是耶路撒冷王、希伯仑王、耶末王、拉吉王、伊矶伦王，大家聚集，率领他们的众军上去，对著基遍安营，攻打基遍。
chapters.en: Therefore the five kings of the Amorites, the king of Jerusalem, the king of Hebron, the king of Jarmuth, the king of Lachish, the king of Eglon, gathered themselves together, and went up, they and all their hosts, and encamped before Gibeon, and made war against it.

chapters.zh: 基遍人就打发人往吉甲的营中去见约书亚，说：你不要袖手不顾你的仆人，求你速速上来拯救我们，帮助我们，因为住山地亚摩利人的诸王都聚集攻击我们。
chapters.en: And the men of Gibeon sent unto Joshua to the camp to Gilgal, saying, Slack not thy hand from thy servants; come up to us quickly, and save us, and help us: for all the kings of the Amorites that dwell in the mountains are gathered together against us.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚和他一切兵丁，并大能的勇士，都从吉甲上去。
chapters.en: So Joshua ascended from Gilgal, he, and all the people of war with him, and all the mighty men of valour.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对约书亚说：不要怕他们；因为我已将他们交在你手里，他们无一人能在你面前站立得住。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Fear them not: for I have delivered them into thine hand; there shall not a man of them stand before thee.

chapters.zh: 约书亚就终夜从吉甲上去，猛然临到他们那里。
chapters.en: Joshua therefore came unto them suddenly, went up from Gilgal all night.

chapters.zh: 耶和华使他们在以色列人面前溃乱。约书亚在基遍大大的杀败他们，追赶他们，在伯和仑的上坡路击杀他们，直到亚西加和玛基大。
chapters.en: And the LORD discomfited them before Israel, and slew them with a great slaughter at Gibeon, and chased them along the way that goeth up to Bethhoron, and smote them to Azekah, and unto Makkedah.

chapters.zh: 他们在以色列人面前逃跑，正在伯和仑下坡的时候，耶和华从天上降大冰雹在他们身上，（冰雹原文作石头）直降到亚西加，打死他们。被冰雹打死的，比以色列人用刀杀死的还多。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as they fled from before Israel, were in the going down to Bethhoron, that the LORD cast down great stones from heaven upon them unto Azekah, and they died: more which died with hailstones than whom the children of Israel slew with the sword.

chapters.zh: 当耶和华将亚摩利人交付以色列人的日子，约书亚就祷告耶和华，在以色列人眼前说：日头阿，你要停在基遍；月亮阿，你要止在亚雅仑谷。
chapters.en: Then spake Joshua to the LORD in the day when the LORD delivered up the Amorites before the children of Israel, and he said in the sight of Israel, Sun, stand thou still upon Gibeon; and thou, Moon, in the valley of Ajalon.

chapters.zh: 于是日头停留，月亮止住，直等国民向敌人报仇。这事岂不是写在雅煞珥书上么？日头在天当中停住，不急速下落，约有一日之久。
chapters.en: And the sun stood still, and the moon stayed, until the people had avenged themselves upon their enemies. not this written in the book of Jasher? So the sun stood still in the midst of heaven, and hasted not to go down about a whole day.

chapters.zh: 在这日以前，这日以后，耶和华听人的祷告，没有像这日的，是因耶和华为以色列争战。
chapters.en: And there was no day like that before it or after it, that the LORD hearkened unto the voice of a man: for the LORD fought for Israel.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人回到吉甲的营中。
chapters.en: And Joshua returned, and all Israel with him, unto the camp to Gilgal.

chapters.zh: 那五王逃跑，藏在玛基大洞里。
chapters.en: But these five kings fled, and hid themselves in a cave at Makkedah.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉约书亚说：那五王已经找到了，都藏在玛基大洞里。
chapters.en: And it was told Joshua, saying, The five kings are found hid in a cave at Makkedah.

chapters.zh: 约书亚说：你们把几块大石头辊到洞口，派人看守，
chapters.en: And Joshua said, Roll great stones upon the mouth of the cave, and set men by it for to keep them:

chapters.zh: 你们却不可耽延，要追赶你们的仇敌，击杀他们尽后边的人，不容他们进自己的城邑，因为耶和华 ─ 你们的神已经把他们交在你们手里。
chapters.en: And stay ye not, pursue after your enemies, and smite the hindmost of them; suffer them not to enter into their cities: for the LORD your God hath delivered them into your hand.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列人大大杀败他们，直到将他们灭尽；其中剩下的人都进了坚固的城。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Joshua and the children of Israel had made an end of slaying them with a very great slaughter, till they were consumed, that the rest remained of them entered into fenced cities.

chapters.zh: 众百姓就安然回玛基大营中，到约书亚那里。没有一人敢向以色列人饶舌。
chapters.en: And all the people returned to the camp to Joshua at Makkedah in peace: none moved his tongue against any of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 约书亚说：打开洞口，将那五王从洞里带出来，领到我面前。
chapters.en: Then said Joshua, Open the mouth of the cave, and bring out those five kings unto me out of the cave.

chapters.zh: 众人就这样行，将那五王，就是耶路撒冷王、希伯仑王、耶末王、拉吉王、伊矶伦王，从洞里带出来，领到约书亚面前。
chapters.en: And they did so, and brought forth those five kings unto him out of the cave, the king of Jerusalem, the king of Hebron, the king of Jarmuth, the king of Lachish, the king of Eglon.

chapters.zh: 带出那五王到约书亚面前的时候，约书亚就召了以色列众人来，对那些和他同去的军长说：你们近前来，把脚踏在这些王的颈项上。他们就近前来，把脚踏在这些王的颈项上。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when they brought out those kings unto Joshua, that Joshua called for all the men of Israel, and said unto the captains of the men of war which went with him, Come near, put your feet upon the necks of these kings. And they came near, and put their feet upon the necks of them.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对他们说：你们不要惧怕，也不要惊惶。应当刚强壮胆，因为耶和华必这样待你们所要攻打的一切仇敌。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto them, Fear not, nor be dismayed, be strong and of good courage: for thus shall the LORD do to all your enemies against whom ye fight.

chapters.zh: 随后约书亚将这五王杀死，挂在五棵树上。他们就在树上直挂到晚上。
chapters.en: And afterward Joshua smote them, and slew them, and hanged them on five trees: and they were hanging upon the trees until the evening.

chapters.zh: 日头要落的时候，约书亚一吩咐，人就把尸首从树上取下来，丢在他们藏过的洞里，把几块大石头放在洞口，直存到今日。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the time of the going down of the sun, Joshua commanded, and they took them down off the trees, and cast them into the cave wherein they had been hid, and laid great stones in the cave's mouth, until this very day.

chapters.zh: 当日，约书亚夺了玛基大，用刀击杀城中的人和王；将其中一切人口尽行杀灭，没有留下一个。他待玛基大王，像从前待耶利哥王一样。
chapters.en: And that day Joshua took Makkedah, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and the king thereof he utterly destroyed, them, and all the souls that therein; he let none remain: and he did to the king of Makkedah as he did unto the king of Jericho.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人从玛基大往立拿去，攻打立拿。
chapters.en: Then Joshua passed from Makkedah, and all Israel with him, unto Libnah, and fought against Libnah:

chapters.zh: 耶和华将立拿和立拿的王也交在以色列人手里。约书亚攻打这城，用刀击杀了城中的一切人口，没有留下一个。他待立拿王，像从前待耶利哥王一样。
chapters.en: And the LORD delivered it also, and the king thereof, into the hand of Israel; and he smote it with the edge of the sword, and all the souls that therein; he let none remain in it; but did unto the king thereof as he did unto the king of Jericho.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人从立拿往拉吉去，对著拉吉安营，攻打这城。
chapters.en: And Joshua passed from Libnah, and all Israel with him, unto Lachish, and encamped against it, and fought against it:

chapters.zh: 耶和华将拉吉交在以色列人的手里。第二天约书亚就夺了拉吉，用刀击杀了城中的一切人口，是照他向立拿一切所行的。
chapters.en: And the LORD delivered Lachish into the hand of Israel, which took it on the second day, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and all the souls that therein, according to all that he had done to Libnah.

chapters.zh: 那时基色王荷兰上来帮助拉吉，约书亚就把他和他的民都击杀了，没有留下一个。
chapters.en: Then Horam king of Gezer came up to help Lachish; and Joshua smote him and his people, until he had left him none remaining.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人从拉吉往伊矶伦去，对著伊矶伦安营，攻打这城。
chapters.en: And from Lachish Joshua passed unto Eglon, and all Israel with him; and they encamped against it, and fought against it:

chapters.zh: 当日就夺了城，用刀击杀了城中的人。那日，约书亚将城中的一切人口尽行杀灭，是照他向拉吉一切所行的。
chapters.en: And they took it on that day, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and all the souls that therein he utterly destroyed that day, according to all that he had done to Lachish.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人从伊矶伦上希伯仑去，攻打这城，
chapters.en: And Joshua went up from Eglon, and all Israel with him, unto Hebron; and they fought against it:

chapters.zh: 就夺了希伯仑和属希伯仑的诸城邑，用刀将城中的人与王，并那些城邑中的人口，都击杀了，没有留下一个，是照他向伊矶伦所行的，把城中的一切人口尽行杀灭。
chapters.en: And they took it, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and the king thereof, and all the cities thereof, and all the souls that therein; he left none remaining, according to all that he had done to Eglon; but destroyed it utterly, and all the souls that therein.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列众人回到底璧，攻打这城，
chapters.en: And Joshua returned, and all Israel with him, to Debir; and fought against it:

chapters.zh: 就夺了底璧和属底璧的城邑，又擒获底璧的王，用刀将这些城中的人口尽行杀灭，没有留下一个。他待底璧和底璧王，像从前待希伯仑和立拿与立拿王一样。
chapters.en: And he took it, and the king thereof, and all the cities thereof; and they smote them with the edge of the sword, and utterly destroyed all the souls that therein; he left none remaining: as he had done to Hebron, so he did to Debir, and to the king thereof; as he had done also to Libnah, and to her king.

chapters.zh: 这样，约书亚击杀全地的人，就是山地、南地、高原、山坡的人，和那些地的诸王，没有留下一个。将凡有气息的尽行杀灭，正如耶和华 ─ 以色列的神所吩咐的。
chapters.en: So Joshua smote all the country of the hills, and of the south, and of the vale, and of the springs, and all their kings: he left none remaining, but utterly destroyed all that breathed, as the LORD God of Israel commanded.

chapters.zh: 约书亚从加低斯巴尼亚攻击到迦萨，又攻击歌珊全地，直到基遍。
chapters.en: And Joshua smote them from Kadeshbarnea even unto Gaza, and all the country of Goshen, even unto Gibeon.

chapters.zh: 约书亚一时杀败了这些王，并夺了他们的地，因为耶和华 ─ 以色列的神为以色列争战。
chapters.en: And all these kings and their land did Joshua take at one time, because the LORD God of Israel fought for Israel.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚和以色列众人回到吉甲的营中。
chapters.en: And Joshua returned, and all Israel with him, unto the camp to Gilgal.

chapters.zh: 夏琐王耶宾听见这事，就打发人去见玛顿王约巴、伸仑王、押煞王，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Jabin king of Hazor had heard , that he sent to Jobab king of Madon, and to the king of Shimron, and to the king of Achshaph,

chapters.zh: 与北方山地、基尼烈南边的亚拉巴高原，并西边多珥山冈的诸王；
chapters.en: And to the kings that on the north of the mountains, and of the plains south of Chinneroth, and in the valley, and in the borders of Dor on the west,

chapters.zh: 又去见东方和西方的迦南人，与山地的亚摩利人、赫人、比利洗人、耶布斯人，并黑门山根米斯巴地的希未人。
chapters.en: the Canaanite on the east and on the west, and the Amorite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Jebusite in the mountains, and the Hivite under Hermon in the land of Mizpeh.

chapters.zh: 这些王和他们的众军都出来，人数多如海边的沙，并有许多马匹车辆。
chapters.en: And they went out, they and all their hosts with them, much people, even as the sand that upon the sea shore in multitude, with horses and chariots very many.

chapters.zh: 这诸王会合，来到米伦水边，一同安营，要与以色列人争战。
chapters.en: And when all these kings were met together, they came and pitched together at the waters of Merom, to fight against Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对约书亚说：你不要因他们惧怕。明日这时，我必将他们交付以色列人全然杀了。你要砍断他们马的蹄筋，用火焚烧他们的车辆。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Be not afraid because of them: for to morrow about this time will I deliver them up all slain before Israel: thou shalt hough their horses, and burn their chariots with fire.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚率领一切兵丁，在米伦水边突然向前攻打他们。
chapters.en: So Joshua came, and all the people of war with him, against them by the waters of Merom suddenly; and they fell upon them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华将他们交在以色列人手里，以色列人就击杀他们，追赶他们到西顿大城，到米斯利弗玛音，直到东边米斯巴的平原，将他们击杀，没有留下一个。
chapters.en: And the LORD delivered them into the hand of Israel, who smote them, and chased them unto great Zidon, and unto Misrephothmaim, and unto the valley of Mizpeh eastward; and they smote them, until they left them none remaining.

chapters.zh: 约书亚就照耶和华所吩咐他的去行，砍断他们马的蹄筋，用火焚烧他们的车辆。
chapters.en: And Joshua did unto them as the LORD bade him: he houghed their horses, and burnt their chariots with fire.

chapters.zh: 当时，约书亚转回夺了夏琐，用刀击杀夏琐王。（素来夏琐在这诸国中是为首的。）
chapters.en: And Joshua at that time turned back, and took Hazor, and smote the king thereof with the sword: for Hazor beforetime was the head of all those kingdoms.

chapters.zh: 以色列人用刀击杀城中的人口，将他们尽行杀灭；凡有气息的没有留下一个。约书亚又用火焚烧夏琐。
chapters.en: And they smote all the souls that therein with the edge of the sword, utterly destroying : there was not any left to breathe: and he burnt Hazor with fire.

chapters.zh: 约书亚夺了这些王的一切城邑，擒获其中的诸王，用刀击杀他们，将他们尽行杀灭，正如耶和华仆人摩西所吩咐的。
chapters.en: And all the cities of those kings, and all the kings of them, did Joshua take, and smote them with the edge of the sword, he utterly destroyed them, as Moses the servant of the LORD commanded.

chapters.zh: 至于造在山冈上的城，除了夏琐以外，以色列人都没有焚烧。约书亚只将夏琐焚烧了。
chapters.en: But the cities that stood still in their strength, Israel burned none of them, save Hazor only; did Joshua burn.

chapters.zh: 那些城邑所有的财物和牲畜，以色列人都取为自己的掠物；惟有一切人口都用刀击杀，直到杀尽；凡有气息的没有留下一个。
chapters.en: And all the spoil of these cities, and the cattle, the children of Israel took for a prey unto themselves; but every man they smote with the edge of the sword, until they had destroyed them, neither left they any to breathe.

chapters.zh: 耶和华怎样吩咐他仆人摩西，摩西就照样吩咐约书亚，约书亚也照样行。凡耶和华所吩咐摩西的，约书亚没有一件懈怠不行的。
chapters.en: As the LORD commanded Moses his servant, so did Moses command Joshua, and so did Joshua; he left nothing undone of all that the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 约书亚夺了那全地，就是山地、一带南地、歌珊全地、高原、亚拉巴、以色列的山地，和山下的高原。
chapters.en: So Joshua took all that land, the hills, and all the south country, and all the land of Goshen, and the valley, and the plain, and the mountain of Israel, and the valley of the same;

chapters.zh: 从上西珥的哈拉山，直到黑门山下利巴嫩平原的巴力迦得，并且擒获那些地的诸王，将他们杀死。
chapters.en: from the mount Halak, that goeth up to Seir, even unto Baalgad in the valley of Lebanon under mount Hermon: and all their kings he took, and smote them, and slew them.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和这诸王争战了许多年日。
chapters.en: Joshua made war a long time with all those kings.

chapters.zh: 除了基遍的希未人之外，没有一城与以色列人讲和的，都是以色列人争战夺来的。
chapters.en: There was not a city that made peace with the children of Israel, save the Hivites the inhabitants of Gibeon: all they took in battle.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华的意思是要使他们心里刚硬，来与以色列人争战，好叫他们尽被杀灭，不蒙怜悯，正如耶和华所吩咐摩西的。
chapters.en: For it was of the LORD to harden their hearts, that they should come against Israel in battle, that he might destroy them utterly, that they might have no favour, but that he might destroy them, as the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 当时约书亚来到，将住山地、希伯仑、底璧、亚拿伯、犹大山地、以色列山地所有的亚衲族人剪除了。约书亚将他们和他们的城邑尽都毁灭。
chapters.en: And at that time came Joshua, and cut off the Anakims from the mountains, from Hebron, from Debir, from Anab, and from all the mountains of Judah, and from all the mountains of Israel: Joshua destroyed them utterly with their cities.

chapters.zh: 在以色列人的地没有留下一个亚衲族人，只在迦萨、迦特，和亚实突有留下的。
chapters.en: There was none of the Anakims left in the land of the children of Israel: only in Gaza, in Gath, and in Ashdod, there remained.

chapters.zh: 这样，约书亚照著耶和华所吩咐摩西的一切话夺了那全地，就按著以色列支派的宗族将地分给他们为业。于是国中太平，没有争战了。
chapters.en: So Joshua took the whole land, according to all that the LORD said unto Moses; and Joshua gave it for an inheritance unto Israel according to their divisions by their tribes. And the land rested from war.

chapters.zh: 以色列人在约但河外向日出之地击杀二王，得他们的地，就是从亚嫩谷直到黑门山，并东边的全亚拉巴之地。
chapters.en: Now these the kings of the land, which the children of Israel smote, and possessed their land on the other side Jordan toward the rising of the sun, from the river Arnon unto mount Hermon, and all the plain on the east:

chapters.zh: 这二王，有住希实本、亚摩利人的王西宏。他所管之地是从亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥和谷中的城，并基列一半，直到亚扪人的境界，雅博河
chapters.en: Sihon king of the Amorites, who dwelt in Heshbon, ruled from Aroer, which upon the bank of the river Arnon, and from the middle of the river, and from half Gilead, even unto the river Jabbok, the border of the children of Ammon;

chapters.zh: 与约但河东边的亚拉巴，直到基尼烈海，又到亚拉巴的海，就是盐海，通伯耶西末的路，以及南方，直到毘斯迦的山根。
chapters.en: And from the plain to the sea of Chinneroth on the east, and unto the sea of the plain, the salt sea on the east, the way to Bethjeshimoth; and from the south, under Ashdothpisgah:

chapters.zh: 又有巴珊王噩。他是利乏音人所剩下的，住在亚斯他录和以得来。
chapters.en: And the coast of Og king of Bashan, of the remnant of the giants, that dwelt at Ashtaroth and at Edrei,

chapters.zh: 他所管之地是黑门山、撒迦、巴珊全地，直到基述人和玛迦人的境界，并基列一半，直到希实本王西宏的境界。
chapters.en: And reigned in mount Hermon, and in Salcah, and in all Bashan, unto the border of the Geshurites and the Maachathites, and half Gilead, the border of Sihon king of Heshbon.

chapters.zh: 这二王是耶和华仆人摩西和以色列人所击杀的；耶和华仆人摩西将他们的地赐给流便人、迦得人，和玛拿西半支派的人为业。
chapters.en: Them did Moses the servant of the LORD and the children of Israel smite: and Moses the servant of the LORD gave it a possession unto the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh.

chapters.zh: 约书亚和以色列人在约但河西击杀了诸王。他们的地是从利巴嫩平原的巴力迦得，直到上西珥的哈拉山。约书亚就将那地按著以色列支派的宗族分给他们为业，
chapters.en: And these the kings of the country which Joshua and the children of Israel smote on this side Jordan on the west, from Baalgad in the valley of Lebanon even unto the mount Halak, that goeth up to Seir; which Joshua gave unto the tribes of Israel a possession according to their divisions;

chapters.zh: 就是赫人、亚摩利人，迦南人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人的山地、高原亚拉巴、山坡、旷野，和南地。
chapters.en: In the mountains, and in the valleys, and in the plains, and in the springs, and in the wilderness, and in the south country; the Hittites, the Amorites, and the Canaanites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites:

chapters.zh: 他们的王：一个是耶利哥王，一个是靠近伯特利的艾城王，
chapters.en: The king of Jericho, one; the king of Ai, which beside Bethel, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是耶路撒冷王，一个是希伯仑王，
chapters.en: The king of Jerusalem, one; the king of Hebron, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是耶末王，一个是拉吉王，
chapters.en: The king of Jarmuth, one; the king of Lachish, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是伊矶伦王，一个是基色王，
chapters.en: The king of Eglon, one; the king of Gezer, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是底璧王，一个是基德王，
chapters.en: The king of Debir, one; the king of Geder, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是何珥玛王，一个是亚拉得王，
chapters.en: The king of Hormah, one; the king of Arad, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是立拿王，一个是亚杜兰王，
chapters.en: The king of Libnah, one; the king of Adullam, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是玛基大王，一个是伯特利王，
chapters.en: The king of Makkedah, one; the king of Bethel, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是他普亚王，一个是希弗王，
chapters.en: The king of Tappuah, one; the king of Hepher, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是亚弗王，一个是拉沙仑王，
chapters.en: The king of Aphek, one; the king of Lasharon, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是玛顿王，一个是夏琐王，
chapters.en: The king of Madon, one; the king of Hazor, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是伸仑米仑王，一个是押煞王，
chapters.en: The king of Shimronmeron, one; the king of Achshaph, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是他纳王，一个是米吉多王，
chapters.en: The king of Taanach, one; the king of Megiddo, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是基低斯王，一个是靠近迦密的约念王，
chapters.en: The king of Kedesh, one; the king of Jokneam of Carmel, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是多珥山冈的多珥王，一个是吉甲的戈印王，
chapters.en: The king of Dor in the coast of Dor, one; the king of the nations of Gilgal, one;

chapters.zh: 一个是得撒王；共计三十一个王。
chapters.en: The king of Tirzah, one: all the kings thirty and one.

chapters.zh: 约书亚年纪老迈，耶和华对他说：你年纪老迈了，还有许多未得之地，
chapters.en: Now Joshua was old stricken in years; and the LORD said unto him, Thou art old stricken in years, and there remaineth yet very much land to be possessed.

chapters.zh: 就是非利士人的全境和基述人的全地。
chapters.en: This the land that yet remaineth: all the borders of the Philistines, and all Geshuri,

chapters.zh: 从埃及前的西曷河往北，直到以革伦的境界，就算属迦南人之地。有非利士人五个首领所管的迦萨人、亚实突人、亚实基伦人、迦特人、以革伦人之地，并有南方亚卫人之地。
chapters.en: From Sihor, which before Egypt, even unto the borders of Ekron northward, is counted to the Canaanite: five lords of the Philistines; the Gazathites, and the Ashdothites, the Eshkalonites, the Gittites, and the Ekronites; also the Avites:

chapters.zh: 又有迦南人的全地，并属西顿人的米亚拉到亚弗，直到亚摩利人的境界。
chapters.en: From the south, all the land of the Canaanites, and Mearah that beside the Sidonians, unto Aphek, to the borders of the Amorites:

chapters.zh: 还有迦巴勒人之地，并向日出的全利巴嫩，就是从黑门山根的巴力迦得，直到哈马口。
chapters.en: And the land of the Giblites, and all Lebanon, toward the sunrising, from Baalgad under mount Hermon unto the entering into Hamath.

chapters.zh: 山地的一切居民，从利巴嫩直到米斯利弗玛音，就是所有的西顿人，我必在以色列人面前赶出他们去。你只管照我所吩咐的，将这地拈阄分给以色列人为业。
chapters.en: All the inhabitants of the hill country from Lebanon unto Misrephothmaim, all the Sidonians, them will I drive out from before the children of Israel: only divide thou it by lot unto the Israelites for an inheritance, as I have commanded thee.

chapters.zh: 现在你要把这地分给九个支派和玛拿西半个支派为业。
chapters.en: Now therefore divide this land for an inheritance unto the nine tribes, and the half tribe of Manasseh,

chapters.zh: 玛拿西那半支派和流便、迦得二支派已经受了产业，就是耶和华的仆人摩西在约但河东所赐给他们的：
chapters.en: With whom the Reubenites and the Gadites have received their inheritance, which Moses gave them, beyond Jordan eastward, as Moses the servant of the LORD gave them;

chapters.zh: 是从亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥和谷中的城，并米底巴的全平原，直到底本，
chapters.en: From Aroer, that upon the bank of the river Arnon, and the city that in the midst of the river, and all the plain of Medeba unto Dibon;

chapters.zh: 和在希实本作王亚摩利王西宏的诸城，直到亚扪人的境界；
chapters.en: And all the cities of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, unto the border of the children of Ammon;

chapters.zh: 又有基列地、基述人、玛迦人的地界，并黑门全山、巴珊全地，直到撒迦；
chapters.en: And Gilead, and the border of the Geshurites and Maachathites, and all mount Hermon, and all Bashan unto Salcah;

chapters.zh: 又有巴珊王噩的全国 ─ 他在亚斯他录和以得来作王（利乏音人所存留的只剩下他）。这些地的人都是摩西所击杀、所赶逐的。
chapters.en: All the kingdom of Og in Bashan, which reigned in Ashtaroth and in Edrei, who remained of the remnant of the giants: for these did Moses smite, and cast them out.

chapters.zh: 以色列人却没有赶逐基述人、玛迦人；这些人仍住在以色列中，直到今日。
chapters.en: Nevertheless the children of Israel expelled not the Geshurites, nor the Maachathites: but the Geshurites and the Maachathites dwell among the Israelites until this day.

chapters.zh: 只是利未支派，摩西（原文作他）没有把产业分给他们。他们的产业乃是献与耶和华 ─ 以色列神的火祭，正如耶和华所应许他们的。
chapters.en: Only unto the tribe of Levi he gave none inheritance; the sacrifices of the LORD God of Israel made by fire their inheritance, as he said unto them.

chapters.zh: 摩西按著流便支派的宗族分给他们产业。
chapters.en: And Moses gave unto the tribe of the children of Reuben according to their families.

chapters.zh: 他们的境界是亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥和谷中的城，靠近米底巴的全平原；
chapters.en: And their coast was from Aroer, that on the bank of the river Arnon, and the city that in the midst of the river, and all the plain by Medeba;

chapters.zh: 希实本并属希实本平原的各城，底本、巴末巴力、伯巴力勉、
chapters.en: Heshbon, and all her cities that in the plain; Dibon, and Bamothbaal, and Bethbaalmeon,

chapters.zh: 雅杂、基底莫、米法押、
chapters.en: And Jahazah, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,

chapters.zh: 基列亭、西比玛、谷中山的细列哈沙辖、
chapters.en: And Kirjathaim, and Sibmah, and Zarethshahar in the mount of the valley,

chapters.zh: 伯毘珥、毘斯迦山坡、伯耶西末；
chapters.en: And Bethpeor, and Ashdothpisgah, and Bethjeshimoth,

chapters.zh: 平原的各城，并亚摩利王西宏的全国。这西宏曾在希实本作王，摩西把他和米甸的族长以未、利金、苏珥、户珥、利巴击杀了；这都是住那地属西宏为首领的。
chapters.en: And all the cities of the plain, and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, whom Moses smote with the princes of Midian, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, dukes of Sihon, dwelling in the country.

chapters.zh: 那时以色列人在所杀的人中，也用刀杀了比珥的儿子术士巴兰。
chapters.en: Balaam also the son of Beor, the soothsayer, did the children of Israel slay with the sword among them that were slain by them.

chapters.zh: 流便人的境界就是约但河与靠近约但河的地。以上是流便人按著宗族所得为业的诸城，并属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And the border of the children of Reuben was Jordan, and the border . This the inheritance of the children of Reuben after their families, the cities and the villages thereof.

chapters.zh: 摩西按著迦得支派的宗族分给他们产业。
chapters.en: And Moses gave unto the tribe of Gad, unto the children of Gad according to their families.

chapters.zh: 他们的境界是雅谢和基列的各城，并亚扪人的一半地，直到拉巴前的亚罗珥；
chapters.en: And their coast was Jazer, and all the cities of Gilead, and half the land of the children of Ammon, unto Aroer that before Rabbah;

chapters.zh: 从希实本到拉抹米斯巴和比多宁，又从玛哈念到底璧的境界，
chapters.en: And from Heshbon unto Ramathmizpeh, and Betonim; and from Mahanaim unto the border of Debir;

chapters.zh: 并谷中的伯亚兰、伯宁拉、疏割、撒分，就是希实本王西宏国中的余地，以及约但河与靠近约但河的地，直到基尼烈海的极边，都在约但河东。
chapters.en: And in the valley, Betharam, and Bethnimrah, and Succoth, and Zaphon, the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, Jordan and border, unto the edge of the sea of Chinnereth on the other side Jordan eastward.

chapters.zh: 以上是迦得人按著宗族所得为业的诸城，并属城的村庄。
chapters.en: This the inheritance of the children of Gad after their families, the cities, and their villages.

chapters.zh: 摩西把产业分给玛拿西半支派，是按著玛拿西半支派的宗族所分的。
chapters.en: And Moses gave unto the half tribe of Manasseh: and was of the half tribe of the children of Manasseh by their families.

chapters.zh: 他们的境界是从玛哈念起，包括巴珊全地，就是巴珊王噩的全国，并在巴珊、睚珥的一切城邑，共六十个。
chapters.en: And their coast was from Mahanaim, all Bashan, all the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the towns of Jair, which in Bashan, threescore cities:

chapters.zh: 基列的一半，并亚斯他录、以得来，就是属巴珊王噩国的二城，是按著宗族给玛拿西的儿子玛吉的一半子孙。
chapters.en: And half Gilead, and Ashtaroth, and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan, unto the children of Machir the son of Manasseh, to the one half of the children of Machir by their families.

chapters.zh: 以上是摩西在约但河东对著耶利哥的摩押平原所分给他们的产业。
chapters.en: These which Moses did distribute for inheritance in the plains of Moab, on the other side Jordan, by Jericho, eastward.

chapters.zh: 只是利未支派，摩西没有把产业分给他们。耶和华 ─ 以色列的神是他们的产业，正如耶和华所应许他们的。
chapters.en: But unto the tribe of Levi Moses gave not inheritance: the LORD God of Israel their inheritance, as he said unto them.

chapters.zh: 以色列人在迦南地所得的产业，就是祭司以利亚撒和嫩的儿子约书亚，并以色列各支派的族长所分给他们的，都记在下面，
chapters.en: And these which the children of Israel inherited in the land of Canaan, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, distributed for inheritance to them.

chapters.zh: 是照耶和华藉摩西所吩咐的，把产业拈阄分给九个半支派。
chapters.en: By lot their inheritance, as the LORD commanded by the hand of Moses, for the nine tribes, and the half tribe.

chapters.zh: 原来，摩西在约但河东已经把产业分给那两个半支派，只是在他们中间没有把产业分给利未人。
chapters.en: For Moses had given the inheritance of two tribes and an half tribe on the other side Jordan: but unto the Levites he gave none inheritance among them.

chapters.zh: 因为约瑟的子孙是两个支派，就是玛拿西和以法莲，所以没有把地分给利未人，但给他们城邑居住，并城邑的郊野，可以牧养他们的牲畜，安置他们的财物。
chapters.en: For the children of Joseph were two tribes, Manasseh and Ephraim: therefore they gave no part unto the Levites in the land, save cities to dwell , with their suburbs for their cattle and for their substance.

chapters.zh: 耶和华怎样吩咐摩西，以色列人就照样行，把地分了。
chapters.en: As the LORD commanded Moses, so the children of Israel did, and they divided the land.

chapters.zh: 那时，犹大人来到吉甲见约书亚，有基尼洗族耶孚尼的儿子迦勒对约书亚说：耶和华在加低斯巴尼亚指著我与你对神人摩西所说的话，你都知道了。
chapters.en: Then the children of Judah came unto Joshua in Gilgal: and Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite said unto him, Thou knowest the thing that the LORD said unto Moses the man of God concerning me and thee in Kadeshbarnea.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的仆人摩西从加低斯巴尼亚打发我窥探这地，那时我正四十岁；我按著心意回报他。
chapters.en: Forty years old I when Moses the servant of the LORD sent me from Kadeshbarnea to espy out the land; and I brought him word again as in mine heart.

chapters.zh: 然而，同我上去的众弟兄使百姓的心消化；但我专心跟从耶和华 ─ 我的神。
chapters.en: Nevertheless my brethren that went up with me made the heart of the people melt: but I wholly followed the LORD my God.

chapters.zh: 当日摩西起誓说：你脚所踏之地定要归你和你的子孙永远为业，因为你专心跟从耶和华 ─ 我的神。
chapters.en: And Moses sware on that day, saying, Surely the land whereon thy feet have trodden shall be thine inheritance, and thy children's for ever, because thou hast wholly followed the LORD my God.

chapters.zh: 自从耶和华对摩西说这话的时候，耶和华照他所应许的使我存活这四十五年；其间以色列人在旷野行走。看哪，现今我八十五岁了，
chapters.en: And now, behold, the LORD hath kept me alive, as he said, these forty and five years, even since the LORD spake this word unto Moses, while Israel wandered in the wilderness: and now, lo, I this day fourscore and five years old.

chapters.zh: 我还是强壮，像摩西打发我去的那天一样；无论是争战，是出入，我的力量那时如何，现在还是如何。
chapters.en: As yet I strong this day as in the day that Moses sent me: as my strength then, even so my strength now, for war, both to go out, and to come in.

chapters.zh: 求你将耶和华那日应许我的这山地给我；那里有亚衲族人，并宽大坚固的城，你也曾听见了。或者耶和华照他所应许的与我同在，我就把他们赶出去。
chapters.en: Now therefore give me this mountain, whereof the LORD spake in that day; for thou heardest in that day how the Anakims there, and the cities great fenced: if so be the LORD with me, then I shall be able to drive them out, as the LORD said.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚为耶孚尼的儿子迦勒祝福，将希伯仑给他为业。
chapters.en: And Joshua blessed him, and gave unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh Hebron for an inheritance.

chapters.zh: 所以希伯仑作了基尼洗族耶孚尼的儿子迦勒的产业，直到今日，因为他专心跟从耶和华 ─ 以色列的神。
