chapters.en: Hebron therefore became the inheritance of Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite unto this day, because that he wholly followed the LORD God of Israel.

chapters.zh: 希伯仑从前名叫基列亚巴；亚巴是亚衲族中最尊大的人。于是国中太平，没有争战了。
chapters.en: And the name of Hebron before Kirjatharba; a great man among the Anakims. And the land had rest from war.

chapters.zh: 犹大支派按著宗族拈阄所得之地是在尽南边，到以东的交界，向南直到寻的旷野。
chapters.en: then was the lot of the tribe of the children of Judah by their families; to the border of Edom the wilderness of Zin southward the uttermost part of the south coast.

chapters.zh: 他们的南界是从盐海的尽边，就是从朝南的海汊起，
chapters.en: And their south border was from the shore of the salt sea, from the bay that looketh southward:

chapters.zh: 通到亚克拉滨坡的南边，接连到寻，上到加低斯巴尼亚的南边，又过希斯仑，上到亚达珥，绕到甲加，
chapters.en: And it went out to the south side to Maalehacrabbim, and passed along to Zin, and ascended up on the south side unto Kadeshbarnea, and passed along to Hezron, and went up to Adar, and fetched a compass to Karkaa:

chapters.zh: 接连到押们，通到埃及小河，直通到海为止。这就是他们的南界。
chapters.en: it passed toward Azmon, and went out unto the river of Egypt; and the goings out of that coast were at the sea: this shall be your south coast.

chapters.zh: 东界是从盐海南边到约但河口。北界是从约但河口的海汊起，
chapters.en: And the east border the salt sea, unto the end of Jordan. And border in the north quarter from the bay of the sea at the uttermost part of Jordan:

chapters.zh: 上到伯曷拉，过伯亚拉巴的北边，上到流便之子波罕的磐石；
chapters.en: And the border went up to Bethhogla, and passed along by the north of Betharabah; and the border went up to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben:

chapters.zh: 从亚割谷往北，上到底璧，直向河南亚都冥坡对面的吉甲；又接连到隐示麦泉，直通到隐罗结，
chapters.en: And the border went up toward Debir from the valley of Achor, and so northward, looking toward Gilgal, that before the going up to Adummim, which on the south side of the river: and the border passed toward the waters of Enshemesh, and the goings out thereof were at Enrogel:

chapters.zh: 上到欣嫩子谷，贴近耶布斯的南界（耶布斯就是耶路撒冷）；又上到欣嫩谷西边的山顶，就是在利乏音谷极北的边界；
chapters.en: And the border went up by the valley of the son of Hinnom unto the south side of the Jebusite; the same Jerusalem: and the border went up to the top of the mountain that before the valley of Hinnom westward, which at the end of the valley of the giants northward:

chapters.zh: 又从山顶延到尼弗多亚的水源，通到以弗仑山的城邑，又延到巴拉（巴拉就是基列耶琳）；
chapters.en: And the border was drawn from the top of the hill unto the fountain of the water of Nephtoah, and went out to the cities of mount Ephron; and the border was drawn to Baalah, which Kirjathjearim:

chapters.zh: 又从巴拉往西绕到西珥山，接连到耶琳山的北边（耶琳就是基撒仑）；又下到伯示麦过亭纳，
chapters.en: And the border compassed from Baalah westward unto mount Seir, and passed along unto the side of mount Jearim, which Chesalon, on the north side, and went down to Bethshemesh, and passed on to Timnah:

chapters.zh: 通到以革伦北边，延到施基仑，接连到巴拉山；又通到雅比聂，直通到海为止。
chapters.en: And the border went out unto the side of Ekron northward: and the border was drawn to Shicron, and passed along to mount Baalah, and went out unto Jabneel; and the goings out of the border were at the sea.

chapters.zh: 西界就是大海和靠近大海之地。这是犹大人按著宗族所得之地四围的交界。
chapters.en: And the west border to the great sea, and the coast . This the coast of the children of Judah round about according to their families.

chapters.zh: 约书亚照耶和华所吩咐的，将犹大人中的一段地，就是基列亚巴，分给耶孚尼的儿子迦勒。亚巴是亚衲族的始祖（基列亚巴就是希伯仑）。
chapters.en: And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the LORD to Joshua, the city of Arba the father of Anak, which Hebron.

chapters.zh: 迦勒就从那里赶出亚衲族的三个族长，就是示筛、亚希幔、挞买；
chapters.en: And Caleb drove thence the three sons of Anak, Sheshai, and Ahiman, and Talmai, the children of Anak.

chapters.zh: 又从那里上去，攻击底璧的居民。（这底璧从前名叫基列西弗。）
chapters.en: And he went up thence to the inhabitants of Debir: and the name of Debir before Kirjathsepher.

chapters.zh: 迦勒说：谁能攻打基列西弗将城夺取，我就把我女儿押撒给他为妻。
chapters.en: And Caleb said, He that smiteth Kirjathsepher, and taketh it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter to wife.

chapters.zh: 迦勒兄弟基纳斯的儿子俄陀聂夺取了那城，迦勒就把女儿押撒给他为妻。
chapters.en: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.

chapters.zh: 押撒过门的时候，劝丈夫向他父亲求一块田，押撒一下驴，迦勒问他说：你要甚么？
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as she came , that she moved him to ask of her father a field: and she lighted off ass; and Caleb said unto her, What wouldest thou?

chapters.zh: 他说：求你赐福给我，你既将我安置在南地，求你也给我水泉。他父亲就把上泉下泉赐给他。
chapters.en: Who answered, Give me a blessing; for thou hast given me a south land; give me also springs of water. And he gave her the upper springs, and the nether springs.

chapters.zh: 以下是犹大支派按著宗族所得的产业。
chapters.en: This the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Judah according to their families.

chapters.zh: 犹大支派尽南边的城邑，与以东交界相近的，就是甲薛、以得、雅姑珥、
chapters.en: And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,

chapters.zh: 基拿、底摩拿、亚大达、
chapters.en: And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,

chapters.zh: 基低斯、夏琐、以提楠、
chapters.en: And Kedesh, and Hazor, and Ithnan,

chapters.zh: 西弗、提炼、比亚绿、
chapters.en: Ziph, and Telem, and Bealoth,

chapters.zh: 夏琐哈大他、加略希斯仑（加略希斯仑就是夏琐）、
chapters.en: And Hazor, Hadattah, and Kerioth, Hezron, which Hazor,

chapters.zh: 亚曼、示玛、摩拉大、
chapters.en: Amam, and Shema, and Moladah,

chapters.zh: 哈萨迦大、黑实门、伯帕列、
chapters.en: And Hazargaddah, and Heshmon, and Bethpalet,

chapters.zh: 哈萨书亚、别是巴、比斯约他、
chapters.en: And Hazarshual, and Beersheba, and Bizjothjah,

chapters.zh: 巴拉、以因、以森、
chapters.en: Baalah, and Iim, and Azem,

chapters.zh: 伊勒多腊、基失、何珥玛、
chapters.en: And Eltolad, and Chesil, and Hormah,

chapters.zh: 洗革拉、麦玛拿、三撒拿、
chapters.en: And Ziklag, and Madmannah, and Sansannah,

chapters.zh: 利巴勿、实忻、亚因、临门，共二十九座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Lebaoth, and Shilhim, and Ain, and Rimmon: all the cities twenty and nine, with their villages:

chapters.zh: 在高原有以实陶、琐拉、亚实拿、
chapters.en: in the valley, Eshtaol, and Zoreah, and Ashnah,

chapters.zh: 撒挪亚、隐干宁、他普亚、以楠、
chapters.en: And Zanoah, and Engannim, Tappuah, and Enam,

chapters.zh: 耶末、亚杜兰、梭哥、亚西加、
chapters.en: Jarmuth, and Adullam, Socoh, and Azekah,

chapters.zh: 沙拉音、亚底他音、基底拉、基底罗他音，共十四座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有洗楠、哈大沙、麦大迦得、
chapters.en: Zenan, and Hadashah, and Migdalgad,

chapters.zh: 底连、米斯巴、约帖、
chapters.en: And Dilean, and Mizpeh, and Joktheel,

chapters.zh: 拉吉、波斯加、伊矶伦、
chapters.en: Lachish, and Bozkath, and Eglon,

chapters.zh: 迦本、拉幔、基提利、
chapters.en: And Cabbon, and Lahmam, and Kithlish,

chapters.zh: 基低罗、伯大衮、拿玛、玛基大，共十六座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Gederoth, Bethdagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有立拿、以帖、亚珊、
chapters.en: Libnah, and Ether, and Ashan,

chapters.zh: 益弗他、亚实拿、尼悉、
chapters.en: And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,

chapters.zh: 基伊拉、亚革悉、玛利沙，共九座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有以革伦和属以革伦的镇市村庄；
chapters.en: Ekron, with her towns and her villages:

chapters.zh: 从以革伦直到海，一切靠近亚实突之地，并属其地的村庄。
chapters.en: From Ekron even unto the sea, all that near Ashdod, with their villages:

chapters.zh: 亚实突和属亚实突的镇市村庄；迦萨和属迦萨的镇市村庄；直到埃及小河，并大海和靠近大海之地。
chapters.en: Ashdod with her towns and her villages, Gaza with her towns and her villages, unto the river of Egypt, and the great sea, and the border :

chapters.zh: 在山地有沙密、雅提珥、梭哥、
chapters.en: And in the mountains, Shamir, and Jattir, and Socoh,

chapters.zh: 大拿、基列萨拿（基列萨拿就是底璧）、
chapters.en: And Dannah, and Kirjathsannah, which Debir,

chapters.zh: 亚拿伯、以实提莫、亚念、
chapters.en: And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,

chapters.zh: 歌珊、何伦、基罗，共十一座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Goshen, and Holon, and Giloh; eleven cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有亚拉、度玛、以珊、
chapters.en: Arab, and Dumah, and Eshean,

chapters.zh: 雅农、伯他普亚、亚非加、
chapters.en: And Janum, and Bethtappuah, and Aphekah,

chapters.zh: 宏他、基列亚巴（基列亚巴就是希伯仑）、洗珥，共九座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Humtah, and Kirjatharba, which Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有玛云、迦密、西弗、淤他、
chapters.en: Maon, Carmel, and Ziph, and Juttah,

chapters.zh: 耶斯列、约甸、撒挪亚、
chapters.en: And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,

chapters.zh: 该隐、基比亚、亭纳，共十座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: Cain, Gibeah, and Timnah; ten cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有哈忽、伯夙、基突、
chapters.en: Halhul, Bethzur, and Gedor,

chapters.zh: 玛腊、伯亚诺、伊勒提君，共六座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Maarath, and Bethanoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有基列巴力（基列巴力就是基列耶琳）、拉巴，共两座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: Kirjathbaal, which Kirjathjearim, and Rabbah; two cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 在旷野有伯亚拉巴、密丁、西迦迦、
chapters.en: In the wilderness, Betharabah, Middin, and Secacah,

chapters.zh: 匿珊、盐城、隐基底，共六座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and Engedi; six cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 至于住耶路撒冷的耶布斯人，犹大人不能把他们赶出去，耶布斯人却在耶路撒冷与犹大人同住，直到今日。
chapters.en: As for the Jebusites the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the children of Judah could not drive them out: but the Jebusites dwell with the children of Judah at Jerusalem unto this day.

chapters.zh: 约瑟的子孙拈阄所得之地是从靠近耶利哥的约但河起，以耶利哥东边的水为界：从耶利哥上去，通过山地的旷野，到伯特利；
chapters.en: And the lot of the children of Joseph fell from Jordan by Jericho, unto the water of Jericho on the east, to the wilderness that goeth up from Jericho throughout mount Bethel,

chapters.zh: 又从伯特利到路斯，接连到亚基人的境界，至亚他绿；
chapters.en: And goeth out from Bethel to Luz, and passeth along unto the borders of Archi to Ataroth,

chapters.zh: 又往西下到押利提人的境界，到下伯和仑的境界，直到基色，通到海为止。
chapters.en: And goeth down westward to the coast of Japhleti, unto the coast of Bethhoron the nether, and to Gezer: and the goings out thereof are at the sea.

chapters.zh: 约瑟的儿子玛拿西、以法莲就得了他们的地业。
chapters.en: So the children of Joseph, Manasseh and Ephraim, took their inheritance.

chapters.zh: 以法莲子孙的境界，按著宗族所得的，记在下面：他们地业的东界是亚他绿亚达到上伯和仑；
chapters.en: And the border of the children of Ephraim according to their families was : even the border of their inheritance on the east side was Atarothaddar, unto Bethhoron the upper;

chapters.zh: 往西通到北边的密米他，又向东绕到他纳示罗，又接连到雅挪哈的东边；
chapters.en: And the border went out toward the sea to Michmethah on the north side; and the border went about eastward unto Taanathshiloh, and passed by it on the east to Janohah;

chapters.zh: 从雅挪哈下到亚他绿，又到拿拉，达到耶利哥，通到约但河为止；
chapters.en: And it went down from Janohah to Ataroth, and to Naarath, and came to Jericho, and went out at Jordan.

chapters.zh: 从他普亚往西，到加拿河，直通到海为止。这就是以法莲支派按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: The border went out from Tappuah westward unto the river Kanah; and the goings out thereof were at the sea. This the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Ephraim by their families.

chapters.zh: 另外在玛拿西人地业中得了些城邑和属城的村庄。这都是分给以法莲子孙的。
chapters.en: And the separate cities for the children of Ephraim among the inheritance of the children of Manasseh, all the cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 他们没有赶出住基色的迦南人；迦南人却住在以法莲人中间，成为作苦工的仆人，直到今日。
chapters.en: And they drave not out the Canaanites that dwelt in Gezer: but the Canaanites dwell among the Ephraimites unto this day, and serve under tribute.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西是约瑟的长子，他的支派拈阄所得之地记在下面。至于玛拿西的长子基列之父（父或作：主）玛吉，因为是勇士就得了基列和巴珊。
chapters.en: There was also a lot for the tribe of Manasseh; for he the firstborn of Joseph; , for Machir the firstborn of Manasseh, the father of Gilead: because he was a man of war, therefore he had Gilead and Bashan.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西其余的子孙，按著宗族拈阄分地，就是亚比以谢子孙，希勒子孙，亚斯列子孙，示剑子孙，希弗子孙，示米大子孙；这些按著宗族，都是约瑟儿子玛拿西子孙的男丁。
chapters.en: There was also for the rest of the children of Manasseh by their families; for the children of Abiezer, and for the children of Helek, and for the children of Asriel, and for the children of Shechem, and for the children of Hepher, and for the children of Shemida: these the male children of Manasseh the son of Joseph by their families.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的元孙，玛吉的曾孙，基列的孙子，希弗的儿子西罗非哈没有儿子，只有女儿。他的女儿名叫玛拉、挪阿、曷拉、密迦、得撒；
chapters.en: But Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, had no sons, but daughters: and these the names of his daughters, Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

chapters.zh: 他们来到祭司以利亚撒和嫩的儿子约书亚并众首领面前，说：耶和华曾吩咐摩西在我们弟兄中分给我们产业。于是约书亚照耶和华所吩咐的，在他们伯叔中，把产业分给他们。
chapters.en: And they came near before Eleazar the priest, and before Joshua the son of Nun, and before the princes, saying, The LORD commanded Moses to give us an inheritance among our brethren. Therefore according to the commandment of the LORD he gave them an inheritance among the brethren of their father.

chapters.zh: 除了约但河东的基列和巴珊地之外，还有十分地归玛拿西，
chapters.en: And there fell ten portions to Manasseh, beside the land of Gilead and Bashan, which on the other side Jordan;

chapters.zh: 因为玛拿西的孙女们在玛拿西的孙子中得了产业。基列地是属玛拿西其余的子孙。
chapters.en: Because the daughters of Manasseh had an inheritance among his sons: and the rest of Manasseh's sons had the land of Gilead.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的境界：从亚设起，到示剑前的密米他，往北到隐他普亚居民之地。
chapters.en: And the coast of Manasseh was from Asher to Michmethah, that before Shechem; and the border went along on the right hand unto the inhabitants of Entappuah.

chapters.zh: 他普亚地归玛拿西，只是玛拿西境界上的他普亚城归以法莲子孙。
chapters.en: Manasseh had the land of Tappuah: but Tappuah on the border of Manasseh to the children of Ephraim;

chapters.zh: 其界下到加拿河的南边。在玛拿西城邑中的这些城邑都归以法莲。玛拿西的地界是在河北直通到海为止；
chapters.en: And the coast descended unto the river Kanah, southward of the river: these cities of Ephraim among the cities of Manasseh: the coast of Manasseh also on the north side of the river, and the outgoings of it were at the sea:

chapters.zh: 南归以法莲，北归玛拿西，以海为界；北边到亚设，东边到以萨迦。
chapters.en: Southward Ephraim's, and northward Manasseh's, and the sea is his border; and they met together in Asher on the north, and in Issachar on the east.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西在以萨迦和亚设境内，有伯善和属伯善的镇市，以伯莲和属以伯莲的镇市，多珥的居民和属多珥的镇市；又有三处山冈，就是隐多珥和属隐多珥的镇市；他纳的居民和属他纳的镇市，米吉多的居民和属米吉多的镇市。
chapters.en: And Manasseh had in Issachar and in Asher Bethshean and her towns, and Ibleam and her towns, and the inhabitants of Dor and her towns, and the inhabitants of Endor and her towns, and the inhabitants of Taanach and her towns, and the inhabitants of Megiddo and her towns, three countries.

chapters.zh: 只是玛拿西子孙不能赶出这些城的居民，迦南人偏要住在那地。
chapters.en: Yet the children of Manasseh could not drive out those cities; but the Canaanites would dwell in that land.

chapters.zh: 及至以色列人强盛了，就使迦南人做苦工，没有把他们全然赶出。
chapters.en: Yet it came to pass, when the children of Israel were waxen strong, that they put the Canaanites to tribute; but did not utterly drive them out.

chapters.zh: 约瑟的子孙对约书亚说：耶和华到如今既然赐福与我们，我们也族大人多，你为甚么仅将一阄一段之地分给我们为业呢？
chapters.en: And the children of Joseph spake unto Joshua, saying, Why hast thou given me one lot and one portion to inherit, seeing I a great people, forasmuch as the LORD hath blessed me hitherto?

chapters.zh: 约书亚说：你们如果族大人多，嫌以法莲山地窄小，就可以上比利洗人、利乏音人之地，在树林中砍伐树木。
chapters.en: And Joshua answered them, If thou a great people, get thee up to the wood , and cut down for thyself there in the land of the Perizzites and of the giants, if mount Ephraim be too narrow for thee.

chapters.zh: 约瑟的子孙说：那山地容不下我们，并且住平原的迦南人，就是住伯善和属伯善的镇市，并住耶斯列平原的人，都有铁车。
chapters.en: And the children of Joseph said, The hill is not enough for us: and all the Canaanites that dwell in the land of the valley have chariots of iron, who of Bethshean and her towns, and who of the valley of Jezreel.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对约瑟家，就是以法莲和玛拿西人，说：你是族大人多，并且强盛，不可仅有一阄之地，
chapters.en: And Joshua spake unto the house of Joseph, to Ephraim and to Manasseh, saying, Thou a great people, and hast great power: thou shalt not have one lot :

chapters.zh: 山地也要归你，虽是树林，你也可以砍伐；靠近之地必归你。迦南人虽有铁车，虽是强盛，你也能把他们赶出去。
chapters.en: But the mountain shall be thine; for it a wood, and thou shalt cut it down: and the outgoings of it shall be thine: for thou shalt drive out the Canaanites, though they have iron chariots, though they strong.

chapters.zh: 以色列的全会众都聚集在示罗，把会幕设立在那里，那地已经被他们制伏了。
chapters.en: And the whole congregation of the children of Israel assembled together at Shiloh, and set up the tabernacle of the congregation there. And the land was subdued before them.

chapters.zh: 以色列人中其余的七个支派还没有分给他们地业。
chapters.en: And there remained among the children of Israel seven tribes, which had not yet received their inheritance.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对以色列人说：耶和华 ─ 你们列祖的神所赐给你们的地，你们耽延不去得，要到几时呢？
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto the children of Israel, How long ye slack to go to possess the land, which the LORD God of your fathers hath given you?

chapters.zh: 你们每支派当选举三个人，我要打发他们去，他们就要起身走遍那地，按著各支派应得的地业写明（或作：画图），就回到我这里来。
chapters.en: Give out from among you three men for tribe: and I will send them, and they shall rise, and go through the land, and describe it according to the inheritance of them; and they shall come to me.

chapters.zh: 他们要将地分做七分；犹大仍在南方，住在他的境内。约瑟家仍在北方，住在他的境内。
chapters.en: And they shall divide it into seven parts: Judah shall abide in their coast on the south, and the house of Joseph shall abide in their coasts on the north.

chapters.zh: 你们要将地分做七分，写明了拿到我这里来。我要在耶和华 ─ 我们神面前，为你们拈阄。
chapters.en: Ye shall therefore describe the land seven parts, and bring hither to me, that I may cast lots for you here before the LORD our God.

chapters.zh: 利未人在你们中间没有分，因为供耶和华祭司的职任就是他们的产业。迦得支派、流便支派，和玛拿西半支派已经在约但河东得了地业，就是耶和华仆人摩西所给他们的。
chapters.en: But the Levites have no part among you; for the priesthood of the LORD their inheritance: and Gad, and Reuben, and half the tribe of Manasseh, have received their inheritance beyond Jordan on the east, which Moses the servant of the LORD gave them.

chapters.zh: 划地势的人起身去的时候，约书亚嘱咐他们说：你们去走遍那地，划明地势，就回到我这里来。我要在示罗这里，耶和华面前，为你们拈阄。
chapters.en: And the men arose, and went away: and Joshua charged them that went to describe the land, saying, Go and walk through the land, and describe it, and come again to me, that I may here cast lots for you before the LORD in Shiloh.

chapters.zh: 他们就去了，走遍那地，按著城邑分做七分，写在册子上，回到示罗营中见约书亚。
chapters.en: And the men went and passed through the land, and described it by cities into seven parts in a book, and came to Joshua to the host at Shiloh.

chapters.zh: 约书亚就在示罗，耶和华面前，为他们拈阄。约书亚在那里，按著以色列人的支派，将地分给他们。
chapters.en: And Joshua cast lots for them in Shiloh before the LORD: and there Joshua divided the land unto the children of Israel according to their divisions.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯支派，按著宗族拈阄所得之地，是在犹大、约瑟子孙中间。
chapters.en: And the lot of the tribe of the children of Benjamin came up according to their families: and the coast of their lot came forth between the children of Judah and the children of Joseph.

chapters.zh: 他们的北界是从约但河起，往上贴近耶利哥的北边；又往西通过山地，直到伯亚文的旷野；
chapters.en: And their border on the north side was from Jordan; and the border went up to the side of Jericho on the north side, and went up through the mountains westward; and the goings out thereof were at the wilderness of Bethaven.

chapters.zh: 从那里往南接连到路斯，贴近路斯（路斯就是伯特利），又下到亚他绿亚达，靠近下伯和仑南边的山；
chapters.en: And the border went over from thence toward Luz, to the side of Luz, which Bethel, southward; and the border descended to Atarothadar, near the hill that on the south side of the nether Bethhoron.

chapters.zh: 从那里往西，又转向南，从伯和仑南对面的山，直达到犹大人的城基列巴力（基列巴力就是基列耶琳）；这是西界。
chapters.en: And the border was drawn , and compassed the corner of the sea southward, from the hill that before Bethhoron southward; and the goings out thereof were at Kirjathbaal, which Kirjathjearim, a city of the children of Judah: this the west quarter.

chapters.zh: 南界是从基列耶琳的尽边起，往西达到尼弗多亚的水源；
chapters.en: And the south quarter from the end of Kirjathjearim, and the border went out on the west, and went out to the well of waters of Nephtoah:

chapters.zh: 又下到欣嫩子谷对面山的尽边，就是利乏音谷北边的山；又下到欣嫩谷，贴近耶布斯的南边；又下到隐罗结；
chapters.en: And the border came down to the end of the mountain that before the valley of the son of Hinnom, which in the valley of the giants on the north, and descended to the valley of Hinnom, to the side of Jebusi on the south, and descended to Enrogel,

chapters.zh: 又往北通到隐示麦，达到亚都冥坡对面的基利绿；又下到流便之子波罕的磐石；
chapters.en: And was drawn from the north, and went forth to Enshemesh, and went forth toward Geliloth, which over against the going up of Adummim, and descended to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben,

chapters.zh: 又接连到亚拉巴对面，往北下到亚拉巴；
chapters.en: And passed along toward the side over against Arabah northward, and went down unto Arabah:

chapters.zh: 又接连到伯曷拉的北边，直通到盐海的北汊，就是约但河的南头；这是南界。
chapters.en: And the border passed along to the side of Bethhoglah northward: and the outgoings of the border were at the north bay of the salt sea at the south end of Jordan: this the south coast.

chapters.zh: 东界是约但河。这是便雅悯人按著宗族，照他们四围的交界所得的地业。
chapters.en: And Jordan was the border of it on the east side. This the inheritance of the children of Benjamin, by the coasts thereof round about, according to their families.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯支派按著宗族所得的城邑就是：耶利哥、伯曷拉、伊麦基悉、
chapters.en: Now the cities of the tribe of the children of Benjamin according to their families were Jericho, and Bethhoglah, and the valley of Keziz,

chapters.zh: 伯亚拉巴、洗玛脸、伯特利、
chapters.en: And Betharabah, and Zemaraim, and Bethel,

chapters.zh: 亚文、巴拉、俄弗拉、
chapters.en: And Avim, and Parah, and Ophrah,

chapters.zh: 基法阿摩尼、俄弗尼、迦巴，共十二座城，还有属城的村庄；
chapters.en: And Chepharhaammonai, and Ophni, and Gaba; twelve cities with their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有基遍、拉玛、比录、
chapters.en: Gibeon, and Ramah, and Beeroth,

chapters.zh: 米斯巴、基非拉、摩撒、
chapters.en: And Mizpeh, and Chephirah, and Mozah,

chapters.zh: 利坚、伊利毘勒、他拉拉、
chapters.en: And Rekem, and Irpeel, and Taralah,

chapters.zh: 洗拉、以利弗、耶布斯（耶布斯就是耶路撒冷）、基比亚、基列，共十四座城，还有属城的村庄。这是便雅悯人按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: And Zelah, Eleph, and Jebusi, which Jerusalem, Gibeath, Kirjath; fourteen cities with their villages. This the inheritance of the children of Benjamin according to their families.

chapters.zh: 为西缅支派的人，按著宗族，拈出第二阄。他们所得的地业是在犹大人地业中间。
chapters.en: And the second lot came forth to Simeon, for the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families: and their inheritance was within the inheritance of the children of Judah.

chapters.zh: 他们所得为业之地就是：别是巴（或名示巴）、摩拉大、
chapters.en: And they had in their inheritance Beersheba, or Sheba, and Moladah,

chapters.zh: 哈萨书亚、巴拉、以森、
chapters.en: And Hazarshual, and Balah, and Azem,

chapters.zh: 伊利多拉、比土力、何珥玛、
chapters.en: And Eltolad, and Bethul, and Hormah,

chapters.zh: 洗革拉、伯玛加博、哈萨苏撒、
chapters.en: And Ziklag, and Bethmarcaboth, and Hazarsusah,

chapters.zh: 伯利巴勿、沙鲁险，共十三座城，还有属城的村庄；
chapters.en: And Bethlebaoth, and Sharuhen; thirteen cities and their villages:

chapters.zh: 又有亚因、利门、以帖、亚珊，共四座城，还有属城的村庄；
chapters.en: Ain, Remmon, and Ether, and Ashan; four cities and their villages:

chapters.zh: 并有这些城邑四围一切的村庄，直到巴拉比珥，就是南地的拉玛。这是西缅支派按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: And all the villages that round about these cities to Baalathbeer, Ramath of the south. This the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families.

chapters.zh: 西缅人的地业是从犹大人地业中得来的；因为犹大人的分过多，所以西缅人在他们的地业中得了地业。
chapters.en: Out of the portion of the children of Judah the inheritance of the children of Simeon: for the part of the children of Judah was too much for them: therefore the children of Simeon had their inheritance within the inheritance of them.

chapters.zh: 为西布伦人，按著宗族，拈出第三阄。他们地业的境界是到撒立；
chapters.en: And the third lot came up for the children of Zebulun according to their families: and the border of their inheritance was unto Sarid:

chapters.zh: 往西上到玛拉拉，达到大巴设，又达到约念前的河；
chapters.en: And their border went up toward the sea, and Maralah, and reached to Dabbasheth, and reached to the river that before Jokneam;

chapters.zh: 又从撒立往东转向日出之地，到吉斯绿他泊的境界，又通到大比拉，上到雅非亚；
chapters.en: And turned from Sarid eastward toward the sunrising unto the border of Chislothtabor, and then goeth out to Daberath, and goeth up to Japhia,

chapters.zh: 从那里往东，接连到迦特希弗，至以特加汛，通到临门，临门延到尼亚；
chapters.en: And from thence passeth on along on the east to Gittahhepher, to Ittahkazin, and goeth out to Remmonmethoar to Neah;

chapters.zh: 又绕过尼亚的北边，转到哈拿顿，通到伊弗他伊勒谷。
chapters.en: And the border compasseth it on the north side to Hannathon: and the outgoings thereof are in the valley of Jiphthahel:

chapters.zh: 还有加他、拿哈拉、伸仑、以大拉、伯利恒，共十二座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Kattath, and Nahallal, and Shimron, and Idalah, and Bethlehem: twelve cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 这些城并属城的村庄就是西布伦人按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: This the inheritance of the children of Zebulun according to their families, these cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 为以萨迦人，按著宗族，拈出第四阄。
chapters.en: the fourth lot came out to Issachar, for the children of Issachar according to their families.

chapters.zh: 他们的境界是到耶斯列、基苏律、书念、
chapters.en: And their border was toward Jezreel, and Chesulloth, and Shunem,

chapters.zh: 哈弗连、示按、亚拿哈拉、
chapters.en: And Hapharaim, and Shion, and Anaharath,

chapters.zh: 拉璧、基善、亚别、
chapters.en: And Rabbith, and Kishion, and Abez,

chapters.zh: 利篾、隐干宁、隐哈大、伯帕薛；
chapters.en: And Remeth, and Engannim, and Enhaddah, and Bethpazzez;

chapters.zh: 又达到他泊、沙哈洗玛、伯示麦，直通到约但河为止，共十六座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And the coast reacheth to Tabor, and Shahazimah, and Bethshemesh; and the outgoings of their border were at Jordan: sixteen cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 这些城并属城的村庄就是以萨迦支派按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: This the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Issachar according to their families, the cities and their villages.

chapters.zh: 为亚设支派，按著宗族，拈出第五阄。
chapters.en: And the fifth lot came out for the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families.

chapters.zh: 他们的境界是黑甲、哈利、比田、押煞、
chapters.en: And their border was Helkath, and Hali, and Beten, and Achshaph,

chapters.zh: 亚拉米勒、亚末、米沙勒；往西达到迦密，又到希曷立纳，
chapters.en: And Alammelech, and Amad, and Misheal; and reacheth to Carmel westward, and to Shihorlibnath;

chapters.zh: 转向日出之地，到伯大衮，达到细步纶往北到伊弗他伊勒谷，到伯以墨和尼业，也通到迦步勒的左边；
chapters.en: And turneth toward the sunrising to Bethdagon, and reacheth to Zebulun, and to the valley of Jiphthahel toward the north side of Bethemek, and Neiel, and goeth out to Cabul on the left hand,

chapters.zh: 又到义伯仑、利合、哈们、加拿，直到西顿大城；
chapters.en: And Hebron, and Rehob, and Hammon, and Kanah, unto great Zidon;

chapters.zh: 转到拉玛和坚固城推罗；又转到何萨，靠近亚革悉一带地方，直通到海；
chapters.en: And the coast turneth to Ramah, and to the strong city Tyre; and the coast turneth to Hosah; and the outgoings thereof are at the sea from the coast to Achzib:

chapters.zh: 又有乌玛、亚弗、利合，共二十二座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: Ummah also, and Aphek, and Rehob: twenty and two cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 这些城并属城的村庄就是亚设支派按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: This the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families, these cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 为拿弗他利人，按著宗族，拈出第六阄。
chapters.en: The sixth lot came out to the children of Naphtali, for the children of Naphtali according to their families.

chapters.zh: 他们的境界是从希利弗从撒拿音的橡树，从亚大米尼吉和雅比聂，直到拉共，通到约但河；
chapters.en: And their coast was from Heleph, from Allon to Zaanannim, and Adami, Nekeb, and Jabneel, unto Lakum; and the outgoings thereof were at Jordan:

chapters.zh: 又转向西到亚斯纳他泊，从那里通到户割，南边到西布伦，西边到亚设，又向日出之地，达到约但河那里的犹大。
chapters.en: And the coast turneth westward to Aznothtabor, and goeth out from thence to Hukkok, and reacheth to Zebulun on the south side, and reacheth to Asher on the west side, and to Judah upon Jordan toward the sunrising.

chapters.zh: 坚固的城就是：西丁、侧耳、哈末、拉甲、基尼烈、
chapters.en: And the fenced cities Ziddim, Zer, and Hammath, Rakkath, and Chinnereth,

chapters.zh: 亚大玛、拉玛、夏琐、
chapters.en: And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,

chapters.zh: 基低斯、以得来、隐夏琐、
chapters.en: And Kedesh, and Edrei, and Enhazor,

chapters.zh: 以利稳、密大伊勒、和琏、伯亚纳、伯示麦，共十九座城，还有属城的村庄。
chapters.en: And Iron, and Migdalel, Horem, and Bethanath, and Bethshemesh; nineteen cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 这些城并属城的村庄就是拿弗他利支派按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: This the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Naphtali according to their families, the cities and their villages.

chapters.zh: 为但支派，按著宗族，拈出第七阄。
chapters.en: the seventh lot came out for the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families.

chapters.zh: 他们地业的境界是琐拉、以实陶、伊珥示麦、
chapters.en: And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Irshemesh,

chapters.zh: 沙拉宾、亚雅仑、伊提拉、
chapters.en: And Shaalabbin, and Ajalon, and Jethlah,

chapters.zh: 以伦、亭拿他、以革伦、
chapters.en: And Elon, and Thimnathah, and Ekron,

chapters.zh: 伊利提基、基比顿、巴拉、
chapters.en: And Eltekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,

chapters.zh: 伊胡得、比尼比拉、迦特临门、
chapters.en: And Jehud, and Beneberak, and Gathrimmon,

chapters.zh: 美耶昆、拉昆，并约帕对面的地界。
chapters.en: And Mejarkon, and Rakkon, with the border before Japho.

chapters.zh: 但人的地界越过原得的地界；因为但人上去攻取利善，用刀击杀城中的人，得了那城，住在其中，以他们先祖但的名将利善改名为但。
chapters.en: And the coast of the children of Dan went out for them: therefore the children of Dan went up to fight against Leshem, and took it, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and possessed it, and dwelt therein, and called Leshem, Dan, after the name of Dan their father.

chapters.zh: 这些城并属城的村庄就是但支派按著宗族所得的地业。
chapters.en: This the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families, these cities with their villages.

chapters.zh: 以色列人按著境界分完了地业，就在他们中间将地给嫩的儿子约书亚为业，
chapters.en: When they had made an end of dividing the land for inheritance by their coasts, the children of Israel gave an inheritance to Joshua the son of Nun among them:

chapters.zh: 是照耶和华的吩咐，将约书亚所求的城，就是以法莲山地的亭拿西拉城，给了他。他就修那城，住在其中。
chapters.en: According to the word of the LORD they gave him the city which he asked, Timnathserah in mount Ephraim: and he built the city, and dwelt therein.

chapters.zh: 这就是祭司以利亚撒和嫩的儿子约书亚，并以色列各支派的族长，在示罗会幕门口，耶和华面前，拈阄所分的地业。这样，他们把地分完了。
chapters.en: These the inheritances, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, divided for an inheritance by lot in Shiloh before the LORD, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation. So they made an end of dividing the country.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕约书亚说：
chapters.en: The LORD also spake unto Joshua, saying,

chapters.zh: 你吩咐以色列人说：你们要照著我藉摩西所晓谕你们的，为自己设立逃城，
chapters.en: Speak to the children of Israel, saying, Appoint out for you cities of refuge, whereof I spake unto you by the hand of Moses:

chapters.zh: 使那无心而误杀人的，可以逃到那里。这些城可以作你们逃避报血仇人的地方。
chapters.en: That the slayer that killeth person unawares unwittingly may flee thither: and they shall be your refuge from the avenger of blood.

chapters.zh: 那杀人的要逃到这些城中的一座城，站在城门口，将他的事情说给城内的长老们听。他们就把他收进城里，给他地方，使他住在他们中间。
chapters.en: And when he that doth flee unto one of those cities shall stand at the entering of the gate of the city, and shall declare his cause in the ears of the elders of that city, they shall take him into the city unto them, and give him a place, that he may dwell among them.

chapters.zh: 若是报血仇的追了他来，长老不可将他交在报血仇的手里；因为他是素无仇恨，无心杀了人的。
chapters.en: And if the avenger of blood pursue after him, then they shall not deliver the slayer up into his hand; because he smote his neighbour unwittingly, and hated him not beforetime.

chapters.zh: 他要住在那城里，站在会众面前听审判，等到那时的大祭司死了，杀人的才可以回到本城本家，就是他所逃出来的那城。
chapters.en: And he shall dwell in that city, until he stand before the congregation for judgment, until the death of the high priest that shall be in those days: then shall the slayer return, and come unto his own city, and unto his own house, unto the city from whence he fled.

chapters.zh: 于是，以色列人在拿弗他利山地分定加利利的基低斯；在以法莲山地分定示剑；在犹大山地分定基列亚巴（基列亚巴就是希伯仑）；
chapters.en: And they appointed Kedesh in Galilee in mount Naphtali, and Shechem in mount Ephraim, and Kirjatharba, which Hebron, in the mountain of Judah.

chapters.zh: 又在约但河外耶利哥东，从流便支派中，在旷野的平原，设立比悉；从迦得支派中设立基列的拉末；从玛拿西支派中设立巴珊的哥兰。
chapters.en: And on the other side Jordan by Jericho eastward, they assigned Bezer in the wilderness upon the plain out of the tribe of Reuben, and Ramoth in Gilead out of the tribe of Gad, and Golan in Bashan out of the tribe of Manasseh.

chapters.zh: 这都是为以色列众人和在他们中间寄居的外人所分定的地邑，使误杀人的都可以逃到那里，不死在报血仇人的手中，等他站在会众面前听审判。
chapters.en: These were the cities appointed for all the children of Israel, and for the stranger that sojourneth among them, that whosoever killeth person at unawares might flee thither, and not die by the hand of the avenger of blood, until he stood before the congregation.

chapters.zh: 那时，利未人的众族长来到祭司以利亚撒和嫩的儿子约书亚，并以色列各支派的族长面前，
chapters.en: Then came near the heads of the fathers of the Levites unto Eleazar the priest, and unto Joshua the son of Nun, and unto the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel;

chapters.zh: 在迦南地的示罗对他们说：从前耶和华藉著摩西吩咐给我们城邑居住，并城邑的郊野可以牧养我们的牲畜。
chapters.en: And they spake unto them at Shiloh in the land of Canaan, saying, The LORD commanded by the hand of Moses to give us cities to dwell in, with the suburbs thereof for our cattle.

chapters.zh: 于是以色列人照耶和华所吩咐的，从自己的地业中，将以下所记的城邑和城邑的郊野给了利未人。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel gave unto the Levites out of their inheritance, at the commandment of the LORD, these cities and their suburbs.

chapters.zh: 为哥辖族拈阄：利未人的祭司、亚伦的子孙，从犹大支派、西缅支派、便雅悯支派的地业中，按阄得了十三座城。
chapters.en: And the lot came out for the families of the Kohathites: and the children of Aaron the priest, of the Levites, had by lot out of the tribe of Judah, and out of the tribe of Simeon, and out of the tribe of Benjamin, thirteen cities.

chapters.zh: 哥辖其余的子孙，从以法莲支派、但支派、玛拿西半支派的地业中，按阄得了十座城。
chapters.en: And the rest of the children of Kohath by lot out of the families of the tribe of Ephraim, and out of the tribe of Dan, and out of the half tribe of Manasseh, ten cities.

chapters.zh: 革顺的子孙，从以萨迦支派、亚设支派、拿弗他利支派、住巴珊的玛拿西半支派的地业中，按阄得了十三座城。
chapters.en: And the children of Gershon by lot out of the families of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the half tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

chapters.zh: 米拉利的子孙，按著宗族，从流便支派、迦得支派、西布伦支派的地业中，按阄得了十二座城。
chapters.en: The children of Merari by their families out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

chapters.zh: 以色列人照著耶和华藉摩西所吩咐的，将这些城邑和城邑的郊野，按阄分给利未人。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel gave by lot unto the Levites these cities with their suburbs, as the LORD commanded by the hand of Moses.

chapters.zh: 从犹大支派、西缅支派的地业中，将以下所记的城给了利未支派哥辖宗族亚伦的子孙；因为给他们拈出头一阄，
chapters.en: And they gave out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, these cities which are mentioned by name,

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: Which the children of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites, of the children of Levi, had: for theirs was the first lot.

chapters.zh: 将犹大山地的基列亚巴和四围的郊野给了他们。亚巴是亚衲族的始祖。（基列亚巴就是希伯仑）。
chapters.en: And they gave them the city of Arba the father of Anak, which Hebron, in the hill of Judah, with the suburbs thereof round about it.

chapters.zh: 惟将属城的田地和村庄给了耶孚尼的儿子迦勒为业。
chapters.en: But the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, gave they to Caleb the son of Jephunneh for his possession.

chapters.zh: 以色列人将希伯仑，就是误杀人的逃城和属城的郊野，给了祭司亚伦的子孙；又给他们立拿和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: Thus they gave to the children of Aaron the priest Hebron with her suburbs, a city of refuge for the slayer; and Libnah with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 雅提珥和属城的郊野，以实提莫和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And Jattir with her suburbs, and Eshtemoa with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 何仑和属城的郊野，底璧和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And Holon with her suburbs, and Debir with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 亚因和属城的郊野，淤他和属城的郊野，伯示麦和属城的郊野，共九座城，都是从这二支派中分出来的。
chapters.en: And Ain with her suburbs, and Juttah with her suburbs, Bethshemesh with her suburbs; nine cities out of those two tribes.

chapters.zh: 又从便雅悯支派的地业中给了他们基遍和属城的郊野，迦巴和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Benjamin, Gibeon with her suburbs, Geba with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 亚拿突和属城的郊野，亚勒们和属城的郊野，共四座城。
chapters.en: Anathoth with her suburbs, and Almon with her suburbs; four cities.

chapters.zh: 亚伦子孙作祭司的共有十三座城，还有属城的郊野。
chapters.en: All the cities of the children of Aaron, the priests, thirteen cities with their suburbs.

chapters.zh: 利未支派中哥辖的宗族，就是哥辖其余的子孙，拈阄所得的城有从以法莲支派中分出来的。
chapters.en: And the families of the children of Kohath, the Levites which remained of the children of Kohath, even they had the cities of their lot out of the tribe of Ephraim.

chapters.zh: 以色列人将以法莲山地的示剑，就是误杀人的逃城和属城的郊野，给了他们；又给他们基色和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: For they gave them Shechem with her suburbs in mount Ephraim, a city of refuge for the slayer; and Gezer with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 基伯先和属城的郊野，伯和仑和属城的郊野，共四座城；
chapters.en: And Kibzaim with her suburbs, and Bethhoron with her suburbs; four cities.

chapters.zh: 又从但支派的地业中给了他们伊利提基和属城的郊野，基比顿和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Dan, Eltekeh with her suburbs, Gibbethon with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 亚雅仑和属城的郊野，迦特临门和属城的郊野，共四座城；
chapters.en: Aijalon with her suburbs, Gathrimmon with her suburbs; four cities.

chapters.zh: 又从玛拿西半支派的地业中给了他们他纳和属城的郊野，迦特临门和属城的郊野，共两座城。
chapters.en: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh, Tanach with her suburbs, and Gathrimmon with her suburbs; two cities.

chapters.zh: 哥辖其余的子孙共有十座城，还有属城的郊野。
chapters.en: All the cities ten with their suburbs for the families of the children of Kohath that remained.

chapters.zh: 以色列人又从玛拿西半支派的地业中将巴珊的哥兰，就是误杀人的逃城和属城的郊野，给了利未支派革顺的子孙；又给他们比施提拉和属城的郊野，共两座城；
chapters.en: And unto the children of Gershon, of the families of the Levites, out of the half tribe of Manasseh Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, a city of refuge for the slayer; and Beeshterah with her suburbs; two cities.

chapters.zh: 又从以萨迦支派的地业中给了他们基善和属城的郊野，大比拉和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Issachar, Kishon with her suburbs, Dabareh with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 耶末和属城的郊野，隐干宁和属城的郊野，共四座城；
chapters.en: Jarmuth with her suburbs, Engannim with her suburbs; four cities.

chapters.zh: 又从亚设支派的地业中给了他们米沙勒和属城的郊野，押顿和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Asher, Mishal with her suburbs, Abdon with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 黑甲和属城的郊野，利合和属城的郊野，共四座城；
chapters.en: Helkath with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs; four cities.

chapters.zh: 又从拿弗他利支派的地业中将加利利的基低斯，就是误杀人的逃城和属城的郊野，给了他们；又给他们哈末多珥和属城的郊野，加珥坦和属城的郊野，共三座城。
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Naphtali, Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, a city of refuge for the slayer; and Hammothdor with her suburbs, and Kartan with her suburbs; three cities.

chapters.zh: 革顺人按著宗族所得的城，共十三座，还有属城的郊野。
chapters.en: All the cities of the Gershonites according to their families thirteen cities with their suburbs.

chapters.zh: 其余利未支派米拉利子孙，从西布伦支派的地业中所得的，就是约念和属城的郊野，加珥他和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And unto the families of the children of Merari, the rest of the Levites, out of the tribe of Zebulun, Jokneam with her suburbs, and Kartah with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 丁拿和属城的郊野，拿哈拉和属城的郊野，共四座城；
chapters.en: Dimnah with her suburbs, Nahalal with her suburbs; four cities.

chapters.zh: 又从流便支派的地业中给了他们比悉和属城的郊野，雅杂和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer with her suburbs, and Jahazah with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 基底莫和属城的郊野，米法押和属城的郊野，共四座城；
chapters.en: Kedemoth with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs; four cities.

chapters.zh: 又从迦得支派的地业中，将基列的拉末，就是误杀人的逃城和属城的郊野，给了他们；又给他们玛哈念和属城的郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Gad, Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, a city of refuge for the slayer; and Mahanaim with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 希实本和属城的郊野，雅谢和属城的郊野，共四座城。
chapters.en: Heshbon with her suburbs, Jazer with her suburbs; four cities in all.

chapters.zh: 其余利未支派的人，就是米拉利的子孙，按著宗族拈阄所得的，共十二座城。
chapters.en: So all the cities for the children of Merari by their families, which were remaining of the families of the Levites, were their lot twelve cities.

chapters.zh: 利未人在以色列人的地业中所得的城，共四十八座，并有属城的郊野。
chapters.en: All the cities of the Levites within the possession of the children of Israel forty and eight cities with their suburbs.

chapters.zh: 这些城四围都有属城的郊野，城城都是如此。
chapters.en: These cities were every one with their suburbs round about them: thus all these cities.

chapters.zh: 这样，耶和华将从前向他们列祖起誓所应许的全地赐给以色列人，他们就得了为业，住在其中。
chapters.en: And the LORD gave unto Israel all the land which he sware to give unto their fathers; and they possessed it, and dwelt therein.

chapters.zh: 耶和华照著向他们列祖起誓所应许的一切话，使他们四境平安；他们一切仇敌中，没有一人在他们面前站立得住。耶和华把一切仇敌都交在他们手中。
chapters.en: And the LORD gave them rest round about, according to all that he sware unto their fathers: and there stood not a man of all their enemies before them; the LORD delivered all their enemies into their hand.

chapters.zh: 耶和华应许赐福给以色列家的话一句也没有落空，都应验了。
chapters.en: There failed not ought of any good thing which the LORD had spoken unto the house of Israel; all came to pass.

chapters.zh: 当时，约书亚召了流便人、迦得人，和玛拿西半支派的人来，
chapters.en: Then Joshua called the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh,

chapters.zh: 对他们说：耶和华仆人摩西所吩咐你们的，你们都遵守了；我所吩咐你们的，你们也都听从了。
chapters.en: And said unto them, Ye have kept all that Moses the servant of the LORD commanded you, and have obeyed my voice in all that I commanded you:

chapters.zh: 你们这许多日子，总没有撇离你们的弟兄，直到今日，并守了耶和华 ─ 你们神所吩咐你们当守的。
chapters.en: Ye have not left your brethren these many days unto this day, but have kept the charge of the commandment of the LORD your God.

chapters.zh: 如今耶和华 ─ 你们神照著他所应许的，使你们弟兄得享平安，现在可以转回你们的帐棚，到耶和华的仆人摩西在约但河东所赐你们为业之地。
chapters.en: And now the LORD your God hath given rest unto your brethren, as he promised them: therefore now return ye, and get you unto your tents, unto the land of your possession, which Moses the servant of the LORD gave you on the other side Jordan.

chapters.zh: 只要切切的谨慎遵行耶和华仆人摩西所吩咐你们的诫命律法，爱耶和华 ─ 你们的神，行他一切的道，守他的诫命，专靠他，尽心尽性事奉他。
chapters.en: But take diligent heed to do the commandment and the law, which Moses the servant of the LORD charged you, to love the LORD your God, and to walk in all his ways, and to keep his commandments, and to cleave unto him, and to serve him with all your heart and with all your soul.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚为他们祝福，打发他们去，他们就回自己的帐棚去了。
chapters.en: So Joshua blessed them, and sent them away: and they went unto their tents.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西那半支派，摩西早已在巴珊分给他们地业。这半支派，约书亚在约但河西，在他们弟兄中，分给他们地业。约书亚打发他们回帐棚的时候为他们祝福，
chapters.en: Now to the half of the tribe of Manasseh Moses had given in Bashan: but unto the half thereof gave Joshua among their brethren on this side Jordan westward. And when Joshua sent them away also unto their tents, then he blessed them,

chapters.zh: 对他们说：你们带许多财物，许多牲畜和金、银、铜、铁，并许多衣服，回你们的帐棚去，要将你们从仇敌夺来的物，与你们众弟兄同分。
chapters.en: And he spake unto them, saying, Return with much riches unto your tents, and with very much cattle, with silver, and with gold, and with brass, and with iron, and with very much raiment: divide the spoil of your enemies with your brethren.

chapters.zh: 于是流便人、迦得人、玛拿西半支派的人从迦南地的示罗起行，离开以色列人，回往他们得为业的基列地，就是照耶和华藉摩西所吩咐的得了为业之地。
chapters.en: And the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh returned, and departed from the children of Israel out of Shiloh, which in the land of Canaan, to go unto the country of Gilead, to the land of their possession, whereof they were possessed, according to the word of the LORD by the hand of Moses.

chapters.zh: 流便人、迦得人，和玛拿西半支派的人到了靠近约但河的一带迦南地，就在约但河那里筑了一座坛；那坛看著高大。
chapters.en: And when they came unto the borders of Jordan, that in the land of Canaan, the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh built there an altar by Jordan, a great altar to see to.

chapters.zh: 以色列人听说流便人、迦得人、玛拿西半支派的人靠近约但河边，在迦南地属以色列人的那边筑了一座坛。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel heard say, Behold, the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh have built an altar over against the land of Canaan, in the borders of Jordan, at the passage of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 全会众一听见，就聚集在示罗，要上去攻打他们。
chapters.en: And when the children of Israel heard , the whole congregation of the children of Israel gathered themselves together at Shiloh, to go up to war against them.

chapters.zh: 以色列人打发祭司以利亚撒的儿子非尼哈，往基列地去见流便人、迦得人、玛拿西半支派的人；
chapters.en: And the children of Israel sent unto the children of Reuben, and to the children of Gad, and to the half tribe of Manasseh, into the land of Gilead, Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest,

chapters.zh: 又打发十个首领与非尼哈同去，就是以色列每支派的一个首领，都是以色列军中的统领。
chapters.en: And with him ten princes, of each chief house a prince throughout all the tribes of Israel; and each one an head of the house of their fathers among the thousands of Israel.

chapters.zh: 他们到了基列地，见流便人、迦得人，和玛拿西半支派的人，对他们说：
chapters.en: And they came unto the children of Reuben, and to the children of Gad, and to the half tribe of Manasseh, unto the land of Gilead, and they spake with them, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华全会众这样说，你们今日转去不跟从耶和华，干犯以色列的神，为自己筑一座坛，悖逆了耶和华，这犯的是甚么罪呢？
chapters.en: Thus saith the whole congregation of the LORD, What trespass this that ye have committed against the God of Israel, to turn away this day from following the LORD, in that ye have builded you an altar, that ye might rebel this day against the LORD?

chapters.zh: 从前拜毘珥的罪孽还算小么？虽然瘟疫临到耶和华的会众，到今日我们还没有洗净这罪。
chapters.en: the iniquity of Peor too little for us, from which we are not cleansed until this day, although there was a plague in the congregation of the LORD,

chapters.zh: 你们今日竟转去不跟从耶和华么？你们今日既悖逆耶和华，明日他必向以色列全会众发怒。
chapters.en: But that ye must turn away this day from following the LORD? and it will be, ye rebel to day against the LORD, that to morrow he will be wroth with the whole congregation of Israel.

chapters.zh: 你们所得为业之地，若嫌不洁净，就可以过到耶和华之地，就是耶和华的帐幕所住之地，在我们中间得地业。只是不可悖逆耶和华，也不可得罪我们，在耶和华 ─ 我们神的坛以外为自己筑坛。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding, if the land of your possession unclean, pass ye over unto the land of the possession of the LORD, wherein the LORD'S tabernacle dwelleth, and take possession among us: but rebel not against the LORD, nor rebel against us, in building you an altar beside the altar of the LORD our God.

chapters.zh: 从前谢拉的曾孙亚干岂不是在那当灭的物上犯了罪，就有忿怒临到以色列全会众么？那人在所犯的罪中不独一人死亡。
chapters.en: Did not Achan the son of Zerah commit a trespass in the accursed thing, and wrath fell on all the congregation of Israel? and that man perished not alone in his iniquity.

chapters.zh: 于是流便人、迦得人、玛拿西半支派的人回答以色列军中的统领说：
chapters.en: Then the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh answered, and said unto the heads of the thousands of Israel,

chapters.zh: 大能者神耶和华！大能者神耶和华！他是知道的！以色列人也必知道！我们若有悖逆的意思，或是干犯耶和华（愿你今日不保佑我们），
chapters.en: The LORD God of gods, the LORD God of gods, he knoweth, and Israel he shall know; if in rebellion, or if in transgression against the LORD, (save us not this day,)

chapters.zh: 为自己筑坛，要转去不跟从耶和华，或是要将燔祭、素祭、平安祭献在坛上，愿耶和华亲自讨我们的罪。
chapters.en: That we have built us an altar to turn from following the LORD, or if to offer thereon burnt offering or meat offering, or if to offer peace offerings thereon, let the LORD himself require ;

chapters.zh: 我们行这事并非无故，是特意做的，说：恐怕日后你们的子孙对我们的子孙说：你们与耶和华 ─ 以色列的神有何关涉呢？
chapters.en: And if we have not done it for fear of thing, saying, In time to come your children might speak unto our children, saying, What have ye to do with the LORD God of Israel?

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华把约但河定为我们和你们这流便人、迦得人的交界，你们与耶和华无分了。这样，你们的子孙就使我们的子孙不再敬畏耶和华了。
chapters.en: For the LORD hath made Jordan a border between us and you, ye children of Reuben and children of Gad; ye have no part in the LORD: so shall your children make our children cease from fearing the LORD.

chapters.zh: 因此我们说：不如为自己筑一座坛，不是为献燔祭，也不是为献别的祭，
chapters.en: Therefore we said, Let us now prepare to build us an altar, not for burnt offering, nor for sacrifice:

chapters.zh: 乃是为你我中间和你我后人中间作证据，好叫我们也在耶和华面前献燔祭、平安祭，和别的祭事奉他，免得你们的子孙日后对我们的子孙说，你们与耶和华无分了。
chapters.en: But it a witness between us, and you, and our generations after us, that we might do the service of the LORD before him with our burnt offerings, and with our sacrifices, and with our peace offerings; that your children may not say to our children in time to come, Ye have no part in the LORD.

chapters.zh: 所以我们说：日后你们对我们，或对我们的后人这样说，我们就可以回答说，你们看我们列祖所筑的坛是耶和华坛的样式；这并不是为献燔祭，也不是为献别的祭，乃是为作你我中间的证据。
chapters.en: Therefore said we, that it shall be, when they should say to us or to our generations in time to come, that we may say , Behold the pattern of the altar of the LORD, which our fathers made, not for burnt offerings, nor for sacrifices; but it a witness between us and you.

chapters.zh: 我们在耶和华 ─ 我们神帐幕前的坛以外，另筑一座坛，为献燔祭、素祭，和别的祭，悖逆耶和华，今日转去不跟从他，我们断没有这个意思。
chapters.en: God forbid that we should rebel against the LORD, and turn this day from following the LORD, to build an altar for burnt offerings, for meat offerings, or for sacrifices, beside the altar of the LORD our God that before his tabernacle.

chapters.zh: 祭司非尼哈与会中的首领，就是与他同来以色列军中的统领，听见流便人、迦得人、玛拿西人所说的话，就都以为美。
chapters.en: And when Phinehas the priest, and the princes of the congregation and heads of the thousands of Israel which with him, heard the words that the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the children of Manasseh spake, it pleased them.

chapters.zh: 祭司以利亚撒的儿子非尼哈对流便人、迦得人、玛拿西人说：今日我们知道耶和华在我们中间，因为你们没有向他犯了这罪。现在你们救以色列人脱离耶和华的手了。
chapters.en: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest said unto the children of Reuben, and to the children of Gad, and to the children of Manasseh, This day we perceive that the LORD among us, because ye have not committed this trespass against the LORD: now ye have delivered the children of Israel out of the hand of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 祭司以利亚撒的儿子非尼哈与众首领离了流便人、迦得人，从基列地回往迦南地，到了以色列人那里，便将这事回报他们。
chapters.en: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, and the princes, returned from the children of Reuben, and from the children of Gad, out of the land of Gilead, unto the land of Canaan, to the children of Israel, and brought them word again.

chapters.zh: 以色列人以这事为美，就称颂神，不再提上去攻打流便人、迦得人、毁坏他们所住的地了。
chapters.en: And the thing pleased the children of Israel; and the children of Israel blessed God, and did not intend to go up against them in battle, to destroy the land wherein the children of Reuben and Gad dwelt.

chapters.zh: 流便人、迦得人给坛起名叫证坛，意思说：这坛在我们中间证明耶和华是神。
chapters.en: And the children of Reuben and the children of Gad called the altar : for it a witness between us that the LORD God.

chapters.zh: 耶和华使以色列人安静，不与四围的一切仇敌争战，已经多日。约书亚年纪老迈，
chapters.en: And it came to pass a long time after that the LORD had given rest unto Israel from all their enemies round about, that Joshua waxed old stricken in age.

chapters.zh: 就把以色列众人的长老、族长、审判官，并官长都召了来，对他们说：我年纪已经老迈。
chapters.en: And Joshua called for all Israel, for their elders, and for their heads, and for their judges, and for their officers, and said unto them, I am old stricken in age:

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你们的神因你们的缘故向那些国所行的一切事，你们亲眼看见了，因那为你们争战的是耶和华 ─ 你们的神。
chapters.en: And ye have seen all that the LORD your God hath done unto all these nations because of you; for the LORD your God he that hath fought for you.

chapters.zh: 我所剪除和所剩下的各国，从约但河起到日落之处的大海，我已经拈阄分给你们各支派为业。
chapters.en: Behold, I have divided unto you by lot these nations that remain, to be an inheritance for your tribes, from Jordan, with all the nations that I have cut off, even unto the great sea westward.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你们的神必将他们从你们面前赶出去，使他们离开你们，你们就必得他们的地为业，正如耶和华 ─ 你们的神所应许的。
chapters.en: And the LORD your God, he shall expel them from before you, and drive them from out of your sight; and ye shall possess their land, as the LORD your God hath promised unto you.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要大大壮胆，谨守遵行写在摩西律法书上的一切话，不可偏离左右。
chapters.en: Be ye therefore very courageous to keep and to do all that is written in the book of the law of Moses, that ye turn not aside therefrom the right hand or the left;

chapters.zh: 不可与你们中间所剩下的这些国民搀杂。他们的神，你们不可提他的名，不可指著他起誓，也不可事奉、叩拜；
chapters.en: That ye come not among these nations, these that remain among you; neither make mention of the name of their gods, nor cause to swear , neither serve them, nor bow yourselves unto them:

chapters.zh: 只要照著你们到今日所行的，专靠耶和华 ─ 你们的神。
chapters.en: But cleave unto the LORD your God, as ye have done unto this day.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华已经把又大又强的国民从你们面前赶出；直到今日，没有一人在你们面前站立得住。
chapters.en: For the LORD hath driven out from before you great nations and strong: but you, no man hath been able to stand before you unto this day.

chapters.zh: 你们一人必追赶千人，因耶和华 ─ 你们的神照他所应许的，为你们争战。
chapters.en: One man of you shall chase a thousand: for the LORD your God, he that fighteth for you, as he hath promised you.

chapters.zh: 你们要分外谨慎，爱耶和华 ─ 你们的神。
chapters.en: Take good heed therefore unto yourselves, that ye love the LORD your God.

chapters.zh: 你们若稍微转去，与你们中间所剩下的这些国民联络，彼此结亲，互相往来，
chapters.en: Else if ye do in any wise go back, and cleave unto the remnant of these nations, these that remain among you, and shall make marriages with them, and go in unto them, and they to you:

chapters.zh: 你们要确实知道，耶和华 ─ 你们的神必不再将他们从你们眼前赶出；他们却要成为你们的网罗、机槛、肋上的鞭、眼中的刺，直到你们在耶和华 ─ 你们神所赐的这美地上灭亡。
chapters.en: Know for a certainty that the LORD your God will no more drive out these nations from before you; but they shall be snares and traps unto you, and scourges in your sides, and thorns in your eyes, until ye perish from off this good land which the LORD your God hath given you.

chapters.zh: 我现在要走世人必走的路。你们是一心一意的知道，耶和华 ─ 你们神所应许赐福与你们的话没有一句落空，都应验在你们身上了。
chapters.en: And, behold, this day I going the way of all the earth: and ye know in all your hearts and in all your souls, that not one thing hath failed of all the good things which the LORD your God spake concerning you; all are come to pass unto you, not one thing hath failed thereof.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你们神所应许的一切福气怎样临到你们身上，耶和华也必照样使各样祸患临到你们身上，直到把你们从耶和华 ─ 你们神所赐的这美地上除灭。
chapters.en: Therefore it shall come to pass, as all good things are come upon you, which the LORD your God promised you; so shall the LORD bring upon you all evil things, until he have destroyed you from off this good land which the LORD your God hath given you.

chapters.zh: 你们若违背耶和华 ─ 你们神吩咐你们所守的约，去事奉别神，叩拜他，耶和华的怒气必向你们发作，使你们在他所赐的美地上速速灭亡。
chapters.en: When ye have transgressed the covenant of the LORD your God, which he commanded you, and have gone and served other gods, and bowed yourselves to them; then shall the anger of the LORD be kindled against you, and ye shall perish quickly from off the good land which he hath given unto you.

chapters.zh: 约书亚将以色列的众支派聚集在示剑，召了以色列的长老、族长、审判官，并官长来，他们就站在神面前。
chapters.en: And Joshua gathered all the tribes of Israel to Shechem, and called for the elders of Israel, and for their heads, and for their judges, and for their officers; and they presented themselves before God.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对众民说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：古时你们的列祖，就是亚伯拉罕和拿鹤的父亲他拉，住在大河那边事奉别神，
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto all the people, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, Your fathers dwelt on the other side of the flood in old time, Terah, the father of Abraham, and the father of Nachor: and they served other gods.

chapters.zh: 我将你们的祖宗亚伯拉罕从大河那边带来，领他走遍迦南全地，又使他的子孙众多，把以撒赐给他；
chapters.en: And I took your father Abraham from the other side of the flood, and led him throughout all the land of Canaan, and multiplied his seed, and gave him Isaac.

chapters.zh: 又把雅各和以扫赐给以撒，将西珥山赐给以扫为业；后来雅各和他的子孙下到埃及去了。
chapters.en: And I gave unto Isaac Jacob and Esau: and I gave unto Esau mount Seir, to possess it; but Jacob and his children went down into Egypt.

chapters.zh: 我差遣摩西、亚伦，并照我在埃及中所行的降灾与埃及，然后把你们领出来。
chapters.en: I sent Moses also and Aaron, and I plagued Egypt, according to that which I did among them: and afterward I brought you out.

chapters.zh: 我领你们列祖出埃及，他们就到了红海；埃及人带领车辆马兵追赶你们列祖到红海。
chapters.en: And I brought your fathers out of Egypt: and ye came unto the sea; and the Egyptians pursued after your fathers with chariots and horsemen unto the Red sea.

chapters.zh: 你们列祖哀求耶和华，他就使你们和埃及人中间黑暗了，又使海水淹没埃及人。我在埃及所行的事，你们亲眼见过。你们在旷野也住了许多年日。
chapters.en: And when they cried unto the LORD, he put darkness between you and the Egyptians, and brought the sea upon them, and covered them; and your eyes have seen what I have done in Egypt: and ye dwelt in the wilderness a long season.

chapters.zh: 我领你们到约但河东亚摩利人所住之地。他们与你们争战，我将他们交在你们手中，你们便得了他们的地为业；我也在你们面前将他们灭绝。
chapters.en: And I brought you into the land of the Amorites, which dwelt on the other side Jordan; and they fought with you: and I gave them into your hand, that ye might possess their land; and I destroyed them from before you.

chapters.zh: 那时，摩押王西拨的儿子巴勒起来攻击以色列人，打发人召了比珥的儿子巴兰来咒诅你们。
chapters.en: Then Balak the son of Zippor, king of Moab, arose and warred against Israel, and sent and called Balaam the son of Beor to curse you:

chapters.zh: 我不肯听巴兰的话，所以他倒为你们连连祝福。这样，我便救你们脱离巴勒的手。
chapters.en: But I would not hearken unto Balaam; therefore he blessed you still: so I delivered you out of his hand.

chapters.zh: 你们过了约但河，到了耶利哥；耶利哥人、亚摩利人、比利洗人、迦南人、赫人、革迦撒人、希未人、耶布斯人都与你们争战；我把他们交在你们手里。
chapters.en: And ye went over Jordan, and came unto Jericho: and the men of Jericho fought against you, the Amorites, and the Perizzites, and the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Girgashites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites; and I delivered them into your hand.

chapters.zh: 我打发黄蜂飞在你们前面，将亚摩利人的二王从你们面前撵出，并不是用你的刀，也不是用你的弓。
chapters.en: And I sent the hornet before you, which drave them out from before you, the two kings of the Amorites; not with thy sword, nor with thy bow.

chapters.zh: 我赐给你们地土，非你们所修治的；我赐给你们城邑，非你们所建造的。你们就住在其中，又得吃非你们所栽种的葡萄园、橄榄园的果子。
chapters.en: And I have given you a land for which ye did not labour, and cities which ye built not, and ye dwell in them; of the vineyards and oliveyards which ye planted not do ye eat.

chapters.zh: 现在你们要敬畏耶和华，诚心实意的事奉他，将你们列祖在大河那边和在埃及所事奉的神除掉，去事奉耶和华。
chapters.en: Now therefore fear the LORD, and serve him in sincerity and in truth: and put away the gods which your fathers served on the other side of the flood, and in Egypt; and serve ye the LORD.

chapters.zh: 若是你们以事奉耶和华为不好，今日就可以选择所要事奉的：是你们列祖在大河那边所事奉的神呢？是你们所住这地的亚摩利人的神呢？至于我和我家，我们必定事奉耶和华。
chapters.en: And if it seem evil unto you to serve the LORD, choose you this day whom ye will serve; whether the gods which your fathers served that on the other side of the flood, or the gods of the Amorites, in whose land ye dwell: but as for me and my house, we will serve the LORD.

chapters.zh: 百姓回答说：我们断不敢离弃耶和华去事奉别神；
chapters.en: And the people answered and said, God forbid that we should forsake the LORD, to serve other gods;

chapters.zh: 因耶和华 ─ 我们的神曾将我们和我们列祖从埃及地的为奴之家领出来，在我们眼前行了那些大神迹，在我们所行的道上，所经过的诸国，都保护了我们。
chapters.en: For the LORD our God, he that brought us up and our fathers out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage, and which did those great signs in our sight, and preserved us in all the way wherein we went, and among all the people through whom we passed:

chapters.zh: 耶和华又把住此地的亚摩利人都从我们面前赶出去。所以，我们必事奉耶和华，因为他是我们的神。
chapters.en: And the LORD drave out from before us all the people, even the Amorites which dwelt in the land: will we also serve the LORD; for he our God.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对百姓说：你们不能事奉耶和华；因为他是圣洁的神，是忌邪的神，必不赦免你们的过犯罪恶。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto the people, Ye cannot serve the LORD: for he an holy God; he a jealous God; he will not forgive your transgressions nor your sins.

chapters.zh: 你们若离弃耶和华去事奉外邦神，耶和华在降福之后，必转而降祸与你们，把你们灭绝。
chapters.en: If ye forsake the LORD, and serve strange gods, then he will turn and do you hurt, and consume you, after that he hath done you good.

chapters.zh: 百姓回答约书亚说：不然，我们定要事奉耶和华。
chapters.en: And the people said unto Joshua, Nay; but we will serve the LORD.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对百姓说：你们选定耶和华，要事奉他，你们自己作见证罢！他们说：我们愿意作见证。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto the people, Ye witnesses against yourselves that ye have chosen you the LORD, to serve him. And they said, witnesses.

chapters.zh: 约书亚说：你们现在要除掉你们中间的外邦神，专心归向耶和华 ─ 以色列的神。
chapters.en: Now therefore put away, , the strange gods which among you, and incline your heart unto the LORD God of Israel.

chapters.zh: 百姓回答约书亚说：我们必事奉耶和华 ─ 我们的神，听从他的话。
chapters.en: And the people said unto Joshua, The LORD our God will we serve, and his voice will we obey.

chapters.zh: 当日，约书亚就与百姓立约，在示剑为他们立定律例典章。
chapters.en: So Joshua made a covenant with the people that day, and set them a statute and an ordinance in Shechem.

chapters.zh: 约书亚将这些话都写在神的律法书上，又将一块大石头立在橡树下耶和华的圣所旁边。
chapters.en: And Joshua wrote these words in the book of the law of God, and took a great stone, and set it up there under an oak, that by the sanctuary of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 约书亚对百姓说：看哪，这石头可以向我们作见证；因为是听见了耶和华所吩咐我们的一切话，倘或你们背弃你们的神，这石头就可以向你们作见证（倘或云云：或作所以要向你们作见证，免得你们背弃耶和华 ─ 你们的神）。
chapters.en: And Joshua said unto all the people, Behold, this stone shall be a witness unto us; for it hath heard all the words of the LORD which he spake unto us: it shall be therefore a witness unto you, lest ye deny your God.

chapters.zh: 于是约书亚打发百姓各归自己的地业去了。
chapters.en: So Joshua let the people depart, every man unto his inheritance.

chapters.zh: 这些事以后，耶和华的仆人嫩的儿子约书亚，正一百一十岁，就死了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after these things, that Joshua the son of Nun, the servant of the LORD, died, an hundred and ten years old.

chapters.zh: 以色列人将他葬在他地业的境内，就是在以法莲山地的亭拿西拉，在迦实山的北边。
chapters.en: And they buried him in the border of his inheritance in Timnathserah, which in mount Ephraim, on the north side of the hill of Gaash.

chapters.zh: 约书亚在世和约书亚死后，那些知道耶和华为以色列人所行诸事的长老还在的时候，以色列人事奉耶和华。
chapters.en: And Israel served the LORD all the days of Joshua, and all the days of the elders that overlived Joshua, and which had known all the works of the LORD, that he had done for Israel.

chapters.zh: 以色列人从埃及所带来约瑟的骸骨，葬埋在示剑，就是在雅各从前用一百块银子向示剑的父亲、哈抹的子孙所买的那块地里；这就作了约瑟子孙的产业。
chapters.en: And the bones of Joseph, which the children of Israel brought up out of Egypt, buried they in Shechem, in a parcel of ground which Jacob bought of the sons of Hamor the father of Shechem for an hundred pieces of silver: and it became the inheritance of the children of Joseph.

chapters.zh: 亚伦的儿子以利亚撒也死了，就把他葬在他儿子非尼哈所得、以法莲山地的小山上。
chapters.en: And Eleazar the son of Aaron died; and they buried him in a hill Phinehas his son, which was given him in mount Ephraim.
